text: In the kingdom of Wyverngarde,[p/] there was a gulf between what was lawful and what was just.
translation: 在维文加德王国，[p/]法律的规定与正义的真谛之间，存在着一条鸿沟。

text: Artificery ran in the houses of the aristocrats.[p/] Disease and vermin ran through the homes of the commonfolk.
translation: 奥术能源充盈着贵族府邸。[p/]疾病与害虫在百姓家中肆虐。

text: People suffered,[p/] people died,[p/] all so the mages of the nobility could keep their plates full and their lives comfortable.
translation: 平民们受苦，[p/]平民们死去，[p/]这都仅仅为了让那些贵族法师们吃饱穿暖，生活无忧。

text: Nevertheless,[p/] they still wanted us to have the illusion of hope.
translation: 尽管如此，[p/]他们仍然想让我们保有一丝希望的假象。

text: They challenged us to win,[p/] leaving out the fact that they were the ones setting the rules.
translation: 他们鼓动我们去争取胜利，[p/]却对规则本身就是他们一手制定的事实避而不谈。

text: Many just threw up their hands,[p/] and no one could blame them.
translation: 许多人干脆举手投降了，[p/]这也无从指摘。

text: You could never lose if you never played.
translation: 毕竟你只要不搅和进去，才永远不会输掉。

text: Rhys: I was transporting a client in my carriage that evening.
translation: Rhys: 那晚，我正载着一位客人。

text: Rhys: We were driving by the McCoy Tavern when we heard a disturbance.
translation: Rhys: 我们路过麦考伊的酒馆时，[p/]听到了一些吵闹声。

text: Rhys: Worried that something was amiss,[p/] I walked into the establishment to see what the commotion was about.
translation: Rhys: 由于担心会出什么事，[p/]我走进了酒馆一探究竟。

text: Rhys: That was when I saw the defendant,[p/] lit by the blue glow of the dining room lights![p/] She had stabbed Flinhart,[p/][s/] and her sword was shining with magical energy!
translation: Rhys: 就在那时我看见了被告。[p/]餐厅里蔚蓝的微光照亮了她的身影。她当时正刺向弗林哈特，[p/][s/]而且她的剑上闪耀着魔法的光芒！

text: Tyrion: Mr. Rudolf,[p/] you testified that you saw my client murdering the victim,[p/] and you supposedly saw her casting magic while doing so.
translation: Tyrion: 鲁道夫先生，[p/]你作证看到我的委托人在杀害被害者。[p/]而且据你所说还看到她同时在施放法术。

text: Rhys: Yes...[p/] I could never forget it.[p/] It was burned into my memory.
translation: Rhys: 是的……[p/]我不可能记错。[p/]那深深地烙印在我的记忆中。

text: Tyrion: I see...[p/] It’s funny that you say that.
translation: Tyrion: 好吧……[p/]按你的说法那就有意思了。

text: Rhys: ...What?
translation: Rhys:……什么意思？

text: Tyrion: Because your entire testimony was a complete lie!
translation: Tyrion: 因为你所有的证言都是彻头彻尾的谎话！

text: Rhys: W-[p/][s/]What?!
translation: Rhys: 什、[p/][s/]什么？！

text: AriaC: What are you trying to imply, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 你想暗示什么呢，卡斯伯特先生？

text: Tyrion: Steelwind,[p/] think about the state of the crime scene!
translation: Tyrion: 斯蒂尔文德，[p/]仔细想想犯罪现场的情况！

text: Tyrion: The witness couldn’t have seen [i]anything[/i],[p/] much less a homicide!
translation: Tyrion: 证人根本[i]什么都看不见[/i]！[p/]更别提目睹了一场[i]凶杀[/i]！

text: Maybe their rules and institutions [i]were[/i] impossible.
translation: 或许他们的规则与制度是[i]无法对抗[/i]的。

text: Maybe I was just a grain of sand trying to stand against an ocean.
translation: 也许我只是一粒沙子，却妄图与整片海洋抗衡。

text: But I would never stop rising—[p/]no matter how many times they tried to drown me.
translation: 但不论他们多少次想要将我淹没[p/]，我永远不会放弃冲出水面。

text: I would do it again and again if it I meant that I could give hope to even one person.
translation: 哪怕仅仅能为一人带来希望，我都会一次又一次地尝试。

text: [i]That[/i] was why I fought.
translation: [i]这[/i]证是我奋战的原因。

text: Sweat was soaking through my suit.[p/] The air of the countryside was choking me.
translation: 汗水已经浸透了我的衬衫。[p/]乡村的气息让我窒息。

text: I fumbled with the leather reins,[p/] tugging at them tightly.
translation: 我笨拙地摆弄着皮缰绳，[p/]把它拉拽得绷紧了。

text: Horse: Where'd this idiot learn how to drive!?
translation: Horse: 这傻子到底在哪学的驾车？

text: Animals were funny like that.[p/] You'd never know it,[p/] but they were constantly making their objections known.
translation: 动物们总是这么有趣。[p/]你只是从来没法知晓，[p/]但它们其实一直在表达反对意见。

text: I'd caught many complaints like that through my Eye of Horus.
translation: 我通过我的荷鲁斯之眼收到了很多类似的抱怨。

text: Ruby: Cuthbert, keep the carriage steady.
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特，把车开稳一点。

text: Tyrion: Y-[p/][s/]Yes, Ms. Tymora.
translation: Tyrion: 好、[p/][s/]好的，泰摩拉女士。

text: My mentor barely looked up from her Runestone.[p/] She was staring at some magical projections—[p/]probably some court files from a case she was working on.
translation: 我的导师几乎就没从她的符石上抬起过视线。[p/]她一直盯着某些法术投影——[p/]大概是她正经手案件的一些法庭记录。

text: I stared longer than I should have.[p/] I'd just passed the legal certification exam,[p/] which only meant that a Runestone of my own was coming my way.
translation: 我盯着看了太久。[p/]我前不久通过了司法资格考试，[p/]这意味着属于我的符石也快到手了。

text: I just had to prove myself,[p/] and this trip was the perfect opportunity.
translation: 我需要证明自己，[p/] 而这次出差正是完美的机会。

text: Dissidence was brewing in the countryside,[p/] and we were on our way to meet with one of the voices of the revolution.
translation: 不满的情绪在乡村不停地酝酿，[p/]而我们正要去会见其中一位革命领袖。

text: The village we were driving to was nearly at the edge of the eastern border,[p/] far from the capital city in the kingdom's center.
translation: 我们驶向的村庄已经接近东部边境，[p/]与王国中心的首都距离遥远。

text: Here,[p/] we ran the risk of running into the military forces deployed to silence voices like his.
translation: 在这里，[p/]我们得冒着与那些想让他闭嘴的军队撞个正着的风险。

text: Whoever this "Flinhart McCoy" was,[p/] Ms. Tymora’s business with him must've been worth all this trouble.
translation: 不管这个“弗林哈特·麦考伊”是什么人，[p/]泰摩拉女士与他的生意一定值得这些付出。

text: Tyrion: M-[p/][s/]Ms. Tymora,[p/] maybe you should switch with me.
translation: Tyrion: 泰、[p/][s/]泰摩拉女士，[p/]可能您得跟我换下手。

text: Ruby: And what would you learn if I did that?
translation: Ruby: 这样的话你又学得到什么呢？

text: ...Maybe I [i]was[/i] worried about nothing.[p/] Practical experience was always a key part of learning whenever she was involved.
translation: ……或许我不该这么[i]唉声叹气[/i]。她也总是说实践经验是学习中关键的一环。

text: Why else would she quietly sit there,[p/] immersed in her court files?
translation: 要不然她为什么只是静静地坐在一边，[p/]埋头研究她的庭审记录呢？

text: Child: Agh!
translation: Child: 啊！

text: ...Did that rock just scream out in pain?
translation: ……是那块石头刚刚发出了痛苦的叫声吗？

text: I grabbed the reins and pulled them with everything I had.[p/] The horses slowed to a stop.
translation: 我抓紧缰绳，用尽全身力气拉拽，[p/]马匹慢慢停了下来。

text: The child was lying face down in the dirt.[p/] A puddle of red was pooling under her.
translation: 一个小孩面朝下地倒在泥土里。[p/]她下方积着一摊红色的东西。

text: Tyrion: Scaled Lord...
translation: Tyrion: 鳞主在上……

text: I wasn't sure what to do.[p/] I wished I'd never procrastinated reading those first-aid books.
translation: 我不知道该怎么办。[p/]真后悔当初一直拖着，没去学习那些急救的书籍。

text: I looked to my mentor.[p/] She'd approached the scene quietly and slowly.
translation: 我看向我的导师，[p/]她沉默而缓慢地走近事发现场。

text: Her eyes went to the child,[p/] then to the surrounding forest.[p/] She seemed to be searching for something.
translation: 她看向那个小孩，[p/]然后扫视四周的丛林。[p/]她看起来在找什么东西。

text: She was wearing the same expression she used when inspecting a crime scene.
translation: 她脸上摆出一副调查犯罪现场时同样的表情。

text: Ruby: ...Why would a kid be out in the middle of nowhere?
translation: Ruby: ……一个小孩子怎么出现在这荒郊野外的？

text: Tyrion: ...Ms. Tymora?
translation: Tyrion: ……泰摩拉女士？

text: Ruby: I say we keep driving and never speak of this again.
translation: Ruby: 要我说，我们就继续开车，这件事不用再提了。

text: Tyrion: Ms. Tymora![p/][s/] She’s just a child!
translation: Tyrion: 泰摩拉女士！[p/][s/]她还只是个小孩子啊！

text: Child: Oh...[p/] The pain... [p/]I can see the light... [h="Where the hell is he?|That was his cue." e="h"/]
translation: Child: 呃……[p/]好疼……[p/]我好像看到光了……[h="那家伙死哪儿去了？|这可是他的活儿" e="h"/]

text: ...I caught a puzzling thought through my Eye of Horus.
translation: ……我的荷鲁斯之眼捕捉到令人费解的想法。

text: Late to his cue,[p/] a man clad in plate armor leaped out of some nearby bushes and stumbled towards us.
translation: 迟疑之间，[p/]一个身着板甲的男子从附近的树丛中跃起，晃晃荡荡地向我们走来。

text: He planted his feet firmly on the ground in front of us,[p/] puffing out his chest.
translation: 他随后在我们面前站定，[p/]高高挺起了胸膛。

text: Knight: By the Scaled Lord![p/][s/] Look what you’ve done!
translation: Knight: 以鳞甲领主之名！[p/][s/]看看你们干的好事！

text: Child: T-[s/][p/]The Scaled Lord...?[p/] I think I can see him.
translation: Child: 鳞、[s/][p/]鳞甲领主……？[p/]我好像都看到祂了……

text: Child: My family—[p/]who all died of the plague in 589—[p/]they're also there.
translation: Child: 我的家人——[p/]他们在589年的瘟疫中死去——[p/]他们也在那里啊。

text: ...Her lines were historically accurate.
translation: ……她的台词倒是对得上史实。

text: Knight: ... [h="Damn it, Alma.|Mentioning that plague is overkill..." e="f"/]
translation: Knight: [h="该死的，阿尔玛。|提到那场瘟疫可做过头了……" e="f"/]

text: Knight: ...This poor child![p/][s/] She’s [i]dead[/i] because of you!
translation: Knight: 可怜的孩子！[p/][s/]她是被你[i]害死[/i]的！

text: Knight: This is a serious crime![p/][s/] The fine is 10[p/]—no,[p/][s/] [i]20[/i] gold pieces! [h="Look at that carriage.|They’re probably aristocrats visiting House Pierce." e="h"/]
translation: Knight: 这可是严重的罪行！[p/][s/]罚金是10枚[p/]——不对，[p/][s/] [i]20枚[/i]金币！[h="看看那气派的马车。|他们肯定是要拜访皮尔斯家的贵族。" e="h"/]

text: 20 gold pieces?[p/] The average sentence for vehicular manslaughter was two years of imprisonment.
translation: 20枚金币？[p/]交通肇事过失致死一般是处两年有期徒刑。

text: Knight: I’ll have no choice but to arrest you unless you can pay this fine!
translation: Knight: 我别无选择，直到你们付清罚金前，必须要拘捕你们！

text: Ruby: Oh,[p/] [i]that's[/i] what this is...
translation: Ruby: 哎呀，[p/] 原来是[i]这个套路[/i]……

text: I side-eyed the child—[p/]apparently named Alma.[p/] I spotted tiny tomato seeds in her pool of blood.
translation: 我向那个小孩子瞟了一眼——[p/]显然她叫作阿尔玛，[p/]我发现她身下的“血泊”中有几粒番茄种子。

text: Tyrion: ...You might want to call someone to retrieve Alma’s body then.
translation: Tyrion: ……那你可能还想喊人把阿尔玛的尸体运走呢。

text: Her eyes opened,[p/] and her head whipped up to look at me.
translation: 她睁开眼睛，[p/]抬头看向我。

text: We locked eyes for a second before her head fell back to the ground.
translation: 我们视线相对一刻，她赶紧又将头垂倒在地。

text: I looked to my mentor again,[p/] but she just leaned her head and gestured towards the two con artists.
translation: 我又看向我的导师，[p/]她只是歪着头，朝那两个骗子做了个手势。

text: It appeared that I was being given another learning opportunity.
translation: 看起来我又得到一次学习的机会。

text: I couldn't complain, though.[p/] I didn’t appreciate being treated like an easy mark.
translation: 我不打算抱怨。[p/]因为我也不想被人觉得容易上当受骗。

text: Knight: A-[p/][s/]Anyways, what will it be?!
translation: Knight: 总、[p/][s/]总之。你到底要怎么办？！

text: Knight: Will you pay your fine,[p/] or do we need to sort this out at the barracks?
translation: Knight: 你是乖乖交出罚金，[p/]还是跟我到营房里把事情搞清楚？

text: Negotiate [c="This was obviously just an accident. Can’t you overlook this?"/]
translation: Negotiate [c="这显然只是个意外。能否就此放过？"/]

text: Tyrion: This was obviously just an accident.[p/] Can’t you look the other way?
translation: Tyrion: 这显然只是个意外。[p/]能不能当做没有发生过呢？

text: Knight: Are you insane?![p/][s/] You want me to spit on my [i]honor[/i] as a knight?!
translation: Knight: 你疯了吗？！[p/][s/]你要践踏我作为骑士的[i]荣耀[/i]吗？！

text: Ruby: ...What are you doing, Cuthbert?
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特，你到底在干嘛？

text: Tyrion: They clearly worked very hard on this.[p/] I thought it would be rude not to play along.
translation: Tyrion: 他们干得这么辛苦。[p/]我觉得不配合一下就太煞风景了。

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Tyrion: ...Sorry.
translation: Tyrion: ……对不起。

text: Comply [c="Okay, I guess we can spare that much gold."/]
translation: Comply [c="好吧，我想我们付得起这笔钱。"/]

text: Tyrion: Okay,[p/] I guess we can spare that much gold.
translation: Tyrion: 好吧，[p/]我想我们付得起这笔钱。

text: Ruby: ...Cuthbert,[p/] what are you doing?
translation: Ruby: ……卡斯伯特，你干什么呢？

text: Tyrion: I just thought arguing with them would be more trouble than it’s worth.
translation: Tyrion: 我就是觉得与他们争吵可能导致比这笔钱更大的损失。

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Tyrion: ...Sorry.
translation: Tyrion: ……对不起。

text: Call [c="Certainly, why don’t you bring us back to your \"barracks\"?"/]
translation: Call [c="好啊，那你干嘛不把我们带回你的“营房”?"/]

text: Tyrion: Certainly,[p/] why don’t you bring us back to your "barracks"?
translation: Tyrion: 好啊，[p/]那你干嘛不把我们带回你的“营房”?

text: Knight: What—?
translation: Knight: 你——？

text: Tyrion: But it [i]is[/i] strange that you’d bring us to your barracks instead of the dungeons.
translation: Tyrion: 你打算把我们带回营房，而不是地牢这一点，确实很[i]奇怪[/i]。

text: Knight: O-[p/][s/]Oh...[p/][s/] Uh—
translation: Knight: 噢、[p/][s/]哦啊……[p/][s/]呃——

text: Tyrion: You’ll also probably want to call your unit to escort us.
translation: Tyrion: 你大概还得召唤你的部队押送我们。

text: Tyrion: After all,[p/] it'd be dangerous for one knight to transport two "criminals" by himself.
translation: Tyrion: 毕竟呢，[p/]仅仅一名骑士独自押送两名“罪犯”还是有些危险。

text: Knight: S-[p/][s/]Shut up![p/][s/] Don't think you can talk your way out of this!
translation: Knight: 闭、[p/][s/]闭嘴！[p/][s/]别以为你三言两语就想脱身！

text: Knight: Are you seriously going to make me take you in?![p/][s/] Just pay the damned fine!
translation: Knight: 你还真想让我把你抓进去？！[p/][s/]快把你的钱给我交了！

text: Vehicular Manslaughter
translation: 交通肇事过失致死

text: Tyrion
translation: 提利昂

text: Knight: ...Who is this?[p/] This is you, isn’t it?
translation: Knight: ……这是谁？[p/]这不就是你，对吧？

text: Tyrion: It sure is.
translation: Tyrion: 确实就是。

text: Knight: ...
translation: Knight: ……

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: Ruby
translation: 鲁比

text: Knight: ...Who is this?[p/] Isn’t this the lady standing beside you?
translation: Knight: ……这又是谁？[p/]这不就是你边上那位女士吗？

text: Tyrion: It sure is.
translation: Tyrion: 确实就是。

text: Knight: ...
translation: Knight: ……

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: Tyrion: Except a "crime" like this wouldn’t involve a fine at all.
translation: Tyrion: 然而像这样的“犯罪”根本不涉及罚款。

text: Knight: ...What?
translation: Knight: ……什么？

text: Tyrion: Vehicular manslaughter has an average sentence of two years of imprisonment.
translation: Tyrion: 交通肇事过失致死一般判处两年有期徒刑。

text: Tyrion: With the death of a child, though,[p/] I could see the Crown pushing for more than that.
translation: Tyrion: 不过如果死者是孩童的话，[p/]王法可能会判得更重一点吧。

text: Knight: ...Who the hell are you?!
translation: Knight: ……你到底是什么人？！

text: Tyrion: I’m a defense attorney.[p/] I could recite every one of the kingdom's laws back to you.
translation: Tyrion: 我是一名辩护律师。[p/]我可以把王国法律的每一条背给你听。

text: Knight: ...
translation: Knight: ……

text: The "knight" looked nervously between Ms. Tymora and me.
translation: “骑士”紧张地在泰摩拉女士和我之间来回打量。

text: Knight: ...That’s it!
translation: Knight: 够了！

text: His hand shot to the rusty sword hanging from his side.
translation: 他的手迅速伸向腰侧悬挂的生锈直剑。

text: He fumbled with it for a bit before pulling it out and waving it at us.
translation: 踉踉跄跄地拔出来，向我们笨拙地挥舞起来。

text: I took a step back.[p/] My mentor put herself in front of me.
translation: 我退了一步，[p/]我的导师则挺身站在我身前。

text: Knight: Enough talk![p/][s/] Give us the gold,[p/] and I won't have to hurt either of you! [h="Come on! Give up!|I can’t move that well in this fake armor..." e="f"/]
translation: Knight: 不要再说了！[p/][s/]把钱给我们，[p/]我就不会伤到你们！[h="快点啊！投降吧！|我穿着这假盔甲也行动不便……" e="f"/]

text: Logic
translation: 逻辑

text: Intuition
translation: 直觉

text: Empathy
translation: 同情

text: Tyrion: What you’re saying doesn’t match what you’re thinking.
translation: Tyrion: 你所说的与所想的不一致。

text: Knight: What am I "thinking"?[p/] What are you talking about?
translation: Knight: 我“所想”的？[p/]你说什么呢？

text: Ruby: Cuthbert,[p/] now is not the time to bluff!
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特，[p/]现在不是虚张声势的时候！

text: Tyrion: O-[p/][s/]Oh, [p/][s/]uh—
translation: Tyrion: 噢、[p/][s/]哦……[p/][s/]呃——

text: [i]He[/i] was the one that was bluffing.[p/] I just needed to call him out on it.
translation: [i]他[/i]才是那个虚张声势的人。[p/]我只需要当面指出他的破绽。

text: I stared at his plate armor.[p/] On a closer look,[p/] it seemed to be varnished wood,[p/] painted to give off a metallic sheen.
translation: 我盯着他的板甲。[p/]仔细一看，[p/]它好像就是涂漆的木头，[p/]只是看起来像金属的光泽。

text: I reached past his sword and knocked on his breastplate.[p/] It let out a hollow thunk instead of a resonant clang.
translation: 我越过他的剑，敲了敲他的胸甲。[p/]它发出的是一声空洞的闷响，而不是清脆的撞击声。

text: Knight: Uh...
translation: Knight: 呃……

text: Tyrion: I didn’t know the kingdom was cutting back.[p/] Would this even protect you in a fight?
translation: Tyrion: 我还真不知道王国削减了军费。[p/]这东西能在战斗中保护你吗？

text: Knight: A-[p/][s/]Are you threatening me?
translation: Knight: 你、[p/][s/]你敢威胁我？

text: Tyrion: With litigation, perhaps.
translation: Tyrion: 或许你可以起诉我。

text: Knight: I-[p/][s/]I have a sword!
translation: Knight: 我、[p/][s/]我有剑的！

text: Tyrion: You won't use it.
translation: Tyrion: 你根本不会用到它。

text: Knight: I—
translation: Knight: 我——

text: Tyrion: Look...[p/] Let's just cut the charade.[p/] It's not happening.
translation: Tyrion: 看吧……[p/]我们就别装模作样了。[p/]什么都不会发生。

text: Knight: ...
translation: Knight: ……

text: Alma rose from the dead and began wiping the rotten, crushed tomatoes off her shirt.
translation: 阿尔玛突然“死而复生”，开始擦去她衣服上烂掉的番茄碎块。

text: Child: Sorry,[p/] I thought that stuff about the plague would help... [h="I'm tired of eating porridge..." e="sf"/]
translation: Child: 对不起，[p/]我还以为提到瘟疫的事情有点用呢……[h="我不想再喝稀粥了……" e="sf"/]

text: Knight: Don’t worry about it...[p/] It’s still morning.[p/] Someone else will come by.
translation: Knight: 别担心……[p/]现在还是早上。[p/]会有其他人经过的。

text: Child: The road’s been empty for days.[p/] What if they’re the only ones?
translation: Child: 这条路上几天都没人经过了。[p/]如果除了他们再没人了怎么办？

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: :The Kingdom of Wyverngarde:[p/] established 613 years ago by the seven high archmages—[p/]ruled by King Olivier and the mages of his nobility.
translation: :维文加德王国：[p/]于613年前由七位高阶奥术法师建立——[p/]如今由奥利维尔国王与贵族法师们统治。

text: They'll often preach that our large kingdom was a land of prosperity and happiness—[p/]a nation where its people shared the wealth and succor created by its magic.
translation: 他们常常宣扬我们幅员辽阔的王国曾是一片繁荣幸福的乐土——[p/]一个国民共享魔法创造的财富和福祉的国家。

text: Tyrion: ...Here.
translation: Tyrion: ……拿去吧。

text: I took out a neatly wrapped sandwich from my satchel and held it out to Alma.
translation: 我从背包中拿出包装整齐的三明治，递给了阿尔玛。

text: Child: W-[p/]What...?
translation: Child: 这、[p/]这是……？

text: Tyrion: You’ll probably find this more filling than porridge.
translation: Tyrion: 这个应该比稀粥更能填报你的肚子。

text: Knight: ...
translation: Knight: ……

text: The man narrowed his eyes,[p/] appraising me like the knight he'd been impersonating.
translation: 那个男人眯起双眼，[p/]就像在打量一名他向来扮演的那种骑士一样打量我。

text: He snatched the wrapped sandwich from me,[p/] peeling back the bread to inspect its contents.
translation: 他从我手上抢走了包好的三明治，[p/]剥开面包来查看里面的内容。

text: His mouth salivated as he caught a whiff of the sliced deli meat.
translation: 他闻到熟肉片的香味，口水都流出来了。

text: No poison to be found, apparently.[p/] He handed it to Alma,[p/] who eagerly began munching down on it.
translation: 显然里面没有下毒。[p/]他把三明治给阿尔玛，[p/]她迫不及待地狼吞虎咽起来。

text: I was probably the first person to share [i]any[/i] "wealth or succor" with them in a long time.
translation: 我或许是很久以来第一个愿意与他们分享[i]任何[/i] “金钱或救济”的人。

text: Knight: ...Just tell me one thing.
translation: Knight: .……就告诉我一件事。

text: Knight: What gave it away?
translation: Knight: 你怎么发现的？

text: Tyrion: ...What do you mean?
translation: Tyrion: ……你是什么意思？

text: Knight: I spent a while sanding this armor down.[p/] I had to go through three attempts just to get it perfectly smooth.
translation: Knight: 我花了好长时间打磨这套“盔甲”。[p/]我试了三次才把它弄得非常光滑。

text: Knight: I even mixed the paint myself.[p/] It's got the sheen and everything.
translation: Knight: 涂料也是我自己调配的。[p/]它光泽亮丽，应有尽有。

text: Knight: How'd you know it was fake?
translation: Knight: 你怎么发现它是假家伙？

text: I thought to myself for a while.
translation: 我沉思了一小会儿。

text: Tyrion: You clearly went for woad,[p/] madder,[p/] and weld for your paint.[p/] I'm also guessing you used a touch of gall ink for the shadows?
translation: Tyrion: 你显然用了靛蓝、[p/]茜草汁、[p/]和焊锡当涂料。[p/]我猜你可能还用了点铁胆墨水画阴影吧？

text: Tyrion: They're decent choices if you’re trying to paint a shield,[p/] but they're useless if you’re trying to mimic the complex nooks and edges of plate armor.
translation: Tyrion: 如果用来给盾牌涂色确实是好选择，[p/]但如果用来模仿板甲复杂的凹槽和边缘就毫无用处了。

text: He just blinked at me.
translation: 他对着我眨了眨眼。

text: Knight: ...Seriously?
translation: Knight: ……你认真的？

text: Tyrion: Plate doesn’t tint that way.[p/] Real plate catches the ambient light in cold tones.
translation: Tyrion: 金属板不是那种色泽。[p/]真正的金属板在环境光下会呈现冷色调。

text: Tyrion: Your mix was a little too warm.
translation: Tyrion: 你的涂料色调有点太暖了。

text: He shook his head,[p/] wide-eyed.
translation: 他摇了摇头，[p/]两眼瞪得老大。

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Ruby: ...Cuthbert,[p/] was that stuff about the paint really true?
translation: Ruby: ……卡斯伯特，[p/]你那番关于涂料的说法是真的吗？

text: Tyrion: [i]*chuckle*[/i][p/] No,[p/] I just read it from his mind.
translation: Tyrion: [i]*暗笑*[/i][p/]不是的，[p/]我只是从他的脑子里读到了。

text: Tyrion: Did you see the look on his face?
translation: Tyrion: 你看到他的脸色了吗？

text: Tyrion: I kind of understand why my mom enjoyed fortune-telling so much.
translation: Tyrion: 我有点明白为什么我妈妈那么喜欢算命了。

text: She said nothing in response.[p/] Her eyes were locked on my satchel,[p/] now one meal short.
translation: 她回应以沉默。[p/]她的视线停在我的书包里，[p/]现在少了一个人的口粮。

text: Tyrion: ...I’ll be fine.[p/] They've probably skipped a lot more meals than I have.
translation: Tyrion: .……没事。[p/]他们肯定比我少吃好多顿饭。

text: Ruby: In case you’ve forgotten,[p/] they were trying to scam us.
translation: Ruby: 你该不会忘了，[p/]他们刚试图欺诈我们。

text: Tyrion: ...If they really wanted to hurt anyone,[p/] they'd throw away that fake armor and just use the sword.
translation: Tyrion: ……如果他们真的是要伤害别人，[p/]就会扔掉那副假盔甲，而是只用那把剑。

text: Tyrion: We should be helping our fellow commoners, right?[p/] Isn't that why we practice law?
translation: Tyrion: 我们要帮助和我们一样的平民，不是吗？[p/]那不正是我们实践律条的办法？

text: Ruby: ...Just don’t expect me to share my lunch with you.
translation: Ruby: .……你就别指望我会跟你分午餐了。

text: Ruby: I spent a good fifteen minutes haggling for those sandwiches.
translation: Ruby: 我可是讲价整整十五分钟才买下三明治的。

text: Tyrion: ...Do we even [i]need[/i] to haggle?
translation: Tyrion: ……我们真的还[i]需要[/i]讲价钱吗？

text: Ruby: It's a matter of principle.[p/] You give anyone an inch,[p/] and they'll take a mile.
translation: Ruby: 这是原则问题。[p/]你向他们让一寸，[p/]他们就会进一尺。

text: We arrived at Kornhaven,[p/] but I smelled the stench before I even spotted the village.
translation: 我们抵达了科尔哈文，[p/]但还没看到村庄我就闻到了臭味。

text: The smell of rotting meat and excrement hung in the air.[p/] I had to fight the urge to retch.
translation: 空气中弥漫着腐肉和粪便的味道。[p/]我强忍住呕吐的冲动。

text: But I did my best to swallow my disgust.[p/] I'd been begging Ms. Tymora to take me on her outings for years.[p/] I couldn't show weakness now.
translation: 但我还是尽力压下了恶心感。[p/]多年来，我一直恳求泰摩拉女士带我一起外出，[p/]现在可不能示弱。

text: Ruby: ...Are you okay?
translation: Ruby: ……你还好吗？

text: Tyrion: ...I'm fine.[p/] I was just...[p/] surprised.
translation: Tyrion: ……还好。[p/]我就是有点儿……[p/]吃惊。

text: Ruby: Did you expect the ruling lord to install modern plumbing in a village like this?
translation: Ruby: 你难道还期望统治者会在这种小村子建设现代化的排水设施吗？

text: Tyrion: ...I guess I never really thought about it.
translation: Tyrion: .……我从来没想过这个问题。

text: Ruby: You'll get used to it once you've traveled more.
translation: Ruby: 只要多旅行，你总会习惯的。

text: Ruby: This is just how things are in the outer regions.
translation: Ruby: 偏远地区的情况就是这样。

text: It really made me appreciate the clean and sanitary streets of the capital.
translation: 这确实让我更加珍惜首都干净卫生的街道了。

text: There,[p/] the streets and homes were loaded with artificery.
translation: 在那里，[p/]街上与放屋里都充满了奥术能源。

text: We had clean and running water.[p/] We had lights that didn't rely on oil and flame.
translation: 我们有干净的的自来水，[p/]有不需要添油点火的灯具。

text: It was as if this village existed in a different time period.
translation: 这个村子好像还在另一个时代一样。

text: ...I reprimanded myself.[p/] I wasn't above this.
translation: ……我教训自己，[p/] 我并非高人一等。

text: The people here were commoners,[p/] just like me.[p/] They only lived like this out of a lack of care from the kingdom.
translation: 与我一样[p/]在此生活的也是平民。[p/] 只是他们生活在这种更少受到王国关心的地方。

text: Ruby: ...Take a left here.[p/] The tavern should be at the edge of town.
translation: Ruby: ……在这里左转。[p/]酒馆应该就在村子的边缘。

text: Ruby: If the reports are right,[p/] this should be the place.
translation: Ruby: 如果报告是准确的，[p/]这应该就是目的地。

text: Tyrion: ...Is this really a meeting place for "dissidents against the Crown"?
translation: Tyrion: .这真的就是“王权反抗运动”的会议地点吗？

text: Flinhart had done an amazing job of disguising their headquarters as a rundown shack.
translation: 弗林哈特真是出色地将他们的指挥部伪装成了一间破旧的小屋。

text: Ruby: The tavern’s been shut down for a few years.
translation: Ruby: 这个酒馆已经休业几年了。

text: Ruby: Nowadays,[p/] Flinhart McCoy just uses it to host his rallies.
translation: Ruby: 如今，[p/]它只是弗林哈特用来举办集会的地方。

text: Flinhart: Hey![p/][s/] You lot![p/][s/] The McCoy Tavern is closed!
translation: Flinhart: 喂！[p/][s/]你们！[p/][s/]麦考伊酒馆已经关门了！

text: The dissident leader stormed towards our carriage as we parked.
translation: 我们刚把马车停好，那位反叛领袖就冲向我们。

text: He had a roughness to him that matched the state of his tavern.[p/] He was practically growling at us with every word.
translation: 他粗犷的性格与破败的酒馆十分相称。[p/] 他每一句话几乎都在对我们咆哮。

text: He got close to Ms. Tymora’s face,[p/] his feet firmly planted on the ground.
translation: 他步伐坚定地走来，[p/] 靠近泰摩拉女士的脸。

text: She was unflinching, of course,[p/] standing her ground as he leered at the two of us.
translation: 当然，她毫不退缩，[p/]一动不动地任凭他斜眼看着我们两个。

text: Ruby: ...I take it you’re Flinhart McCoy?
translation: Ruby: .……你就是弗林哈特·麦考伊吧？

text: Flinhart: ...What’s it to [i]you[/i]?!
translation: Flinhart: ……那 [i]你[/i]又是谁？！

text: Ruby: Sorry for not writing ahead of time,[p/] but my messages weren’t getting through.
translation: Ruby: 抱歉没有提前告知，[p/]但我的信件似乎送不到这里。

text: Ruby: I’m Ruby Tymora.[p/] I’ve been trying to get in touch with you, Flinhart.
translation: Ruby: 我是鲁比·泰摩拉，[p/]我一直在试图与你取得联系，弗林哈特。

text: Flinhart: ...What?
translation: Flinhart: ……什么？

text: His eyes narrowed for a bit before widening in recognition of the name.
translation: 他眯起眼睛片刻，然后想起了这个名字，眼睛又睁得大大的。

text: Flinhart: Wait...[p/][s/] Ruby [i]Tymora[/i]?!
translation: Flinhart: 等等……[p/][s/]鲁比·[i]泰摩拉[/i]？！

text: Flinhart: Why didn’t you say so?![p/][s/] Come on in!
translation: Flinhart: 你怎么不早说？！[p/][s/]进来进来！

text: His tone flipped to jovial in an instant.[p/] Now it was as if he were greeting an old friend.
translation: 他的语气瞬间变得欢快起来。[p/] 就好像迎接一位老朋友一样。

text: I was surprised people out here even knew who she was.[p/] I'd have thought her infamy had only spread in the city.
translation: 很惊讶这里居然有人知道她是谁。[p/] 我原以为她的恶名只在城里流传。

text: I guess he acknowledged her as an ally.[p/] They both had a common enemy, after all.
translation: 但我猜他应该是把她当盟友的。[p/]毕竟他们有共同的敌人。

text: Flinhart: Excuse the mess.[p/] We haven't exactly seen a lot of guests.
translation: Flinhart: 不好意思这里没怎么收拾。[p/]我们并没有很多客人。

text: Ruby: ...It's fine.
translation: Ruby: ……没关系。

text: My mentor looked around warily as she brushed aside a spider web hanging in front of her.
translation: 我的导师谨慎地环顾四周，拂去挂在她面前的一张蜘蛛网。

text: Flinhart: So what brings you here?[p/] I doubt someone like you has anything to see out here.
translation: Flinhart: 所以什么风把你吹来了？[p/]我以为你这样的人在这里没什么可看的。

text: Ruby: One of my clients has been trying to talk to you.[p/] We have a proposition that you’ll be interested in.
translation: Ruby: 我的一个客户一直想与你交谈。[p/]我们有一个提议，相信您会感兴趣。

text: I raised my eyebrow at her.[p/] This was the first time I'd heard of this "client".
translation: 我对着她挑了挑眉。[p/]这还是我第一次听说有这么个“客户”。

text: Ruby: ...Is there anywhere where we could talk in private?
translation: Ruby: ……这里有适合我们密谈的场所吗？

text: Flinhart: I've got a bunch of empty rooms upstairs.
translation: Flinhart: 楼上有好几个空房间。

text: Ruby: Perfect.[p/] Cuthbert,[p/] stay here for a moment.
translation: Ruby: 完美。[p/]卡斯伯特，[p/]你在这里等会儿吧。

text: Tyrion: ...Don't you need my help?
translation: Tyrion: ……你不需要我帮忙吗？

text: Ruby: There’s no need for that.
translation: Ruby: 没有这个必要。

text: How was there no need?[p/] The Eye of Horus could extract anything she needed from him.
translation: 怎么会没有呢？[p/] 我的荷鲁斯之眼可以从他身上提取任何她需要的信息。

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: That glare overruled my objection before I could get it out.
translation: 但那道目光让我还没来得及提出异议就乖乖闭上了嘴。

text: Without another word,[p/] they went up the stairs.
translation: 再无一言，[p/]他们就那样上楼了。

text: I drummed my hands on the dusty table,[p/] looking around the tavern.
translation: 我用手敲着布满灰尘的桌子，[p/]环顾酒馆四周。

text: It definitely had a lot of[p/] personality—[p/]if one counted dust and insects as character traits.
translation: 它确实很有[p/]个性——[p/]如果把灰尘和昆虫也算作特点的话。

text: Faint murmurs echoed from the ceiling,[p/] slightly stressed.
translation: 天花板上传来微弱的低语声，[p/]听起来略显紧张。

text: It sounded like their conversation was becoming more frustrated.
translation: 听着像是他们的对话愈发令人沮丧。

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: I brought out a small chessboard from my satchel.[p/] Even after a decade,[p/] it had served me well.
translation: 我从书包里拿出一个小棋盘。[p/]即使是过了十年之久，[p/]它依然对我帮助很大。

text: Chess could be played with one person—[p/]something that I’d always taken advantage of.
translation: 象棋可以一个人玩——[p/]正是我一直以来擅长的事情。

text: I had a match with the Duke of Commerce scheduled in a few months.
translation: 我原定几个月后与那个商业公爵进行一场棋赛。

text: I wasn't too worried about him,[p/] but I might as well take this opportunity.
translation: 我并不太担心他，[p/]但也得抓住这个机会。

text: Tyrion: Checkmate.
translation: Tyrion: 将死。

text: I lost again while playing as white.[p/] That was three times now.
translation: 我又一次在执白棋时落败。[p/]已经三次了。

text: Celeste: Oh...[p/] Hello!
translation: Celeste: 哦……[p/]你好啊！

text: Statistically,[p/] white was more likely to win.[p/] So why was I performing better as black?
translation: 从统计结果来看，[p/]白棋应该胜率更高。[p/]所以我为什么执黑棋的时候胜率更高呢？

text: Celeste: Um...
translation: Celeste: 嗯……

text: Was I becoming overconfident as white because it had an advantage?
translation: 是因为我执白棋的时候在优势下过于自信了吗？

text: Celeste: Hello?
translation: Celeste: 你好？

text: That very advantage could be affecting my choices and making me play suboptimally...
translation: 或许正是那种优势影响我的决策，让我的棋步欠优——

text: If a personal quirk was making me play like this,[p/] then I needed to identify and correct it.
translation: 如果是个人的手癖让我这样下棋，[p/]那我就得把它找出来并予以纠正。

text: Celeste: Hey!
translation: Celeste: 嘿！

text: Tyrion: A-[p/][s/]Ah!
translation: Tyrion: 呃、p/][s/]啊！

text: I nearly toppled out of my seat when she tapped me on the shoulder.
translation: 她拍上我肩膀的时候我几乎要从座位上跳起来。

text: She stepped back and flashed me a soft grin.[p/] Her body swayed playfully,[p/] amused by how flustered I was.
translation: 她后退一步，对我露出一个温柔的笑容。[p/]她的身体俏皮地摇晃，[p/]被我慌乱的样子逗乐了。

text: Her posture was unguarded.[p/] It was as if she'd never felt threatened in her life.
translation: 她的姿态没有防备，[p/]好像她生来从未感到任何威胁。

text: She was holding a large exotic sword in her right hand,[p/] but I barely even noticed it.
translation: 她右手侧有一把巨大的异国风宝剑，[p/] 我却几乎没注意到。

text: As her warm and bright aura washed over me,[p/] it pulled away any tension and unease I might have felt.
translation: 她温暖明亮的气息笼罩着我，[p/]驱散了我本应感到的紧张和不安。

text: Tyrion: S-[p/][s/]Sorry...[p/] I was distracted...
translation: Tyrion: 抱、[p/][s/]抱歉，[p/]我当时心不在焉……

text: Celeste: You know the McCoy Tavern is closed, right?
translation: Celeste: 你知道麦考伊酒馆关着门呢，是吧？

text: Celeste: But if you’re okay with keeping things off the books,[p/] I can prepare a room for you.
translation: Celeste: 但你要觉得不入账也没关系的话,[p/]我能给你准备一间客房。

text: Tyrion: N-[p/]No...[p/] That's fine.[p/] I’m just waiting for my mentor to finish speaking with Flinhart.
translation: Tyrion: 不、[p/]不是……[p/]不是这样。[p/]我只是在等我的导师和弗林哈特谈完话。

text: Celeste: Oh,[p/] someone’s talking to my dad?
translation: Celeste: 噢，[p/]有人在和我爸爸谈话啊？

text: Tyrion: ...Your dad?
translation: Tyrion: ……你的爸爸？

text: Celeste: I'm Flinhart’s daughter:[p/] Celeste.
translation: Celeste: 我是弗林哈特的女儿。[p/]我叫塞莱斯特。

text: Tyrion: I-[p/][s/]I'm Tyrion.[p/] Nice to meet you.
translation: Tyrion: 我、[p/][s/]我叫提利昂。[p/]很高兴与你认识。

text: Celeste: Do you know when they’ll be done?[p/] I wanted to show him something.
translation: Celeste: 你知道他们还要多久吗？[p/]我想给爸爸看个东西。

text: The mumbling upstairs was becoming more frustrated.
translation: 楼上传来的低语声愈发沮丧了。

text: Celeste tilted her head as she looked at the ceiling,[p/] but she soon got distracted by my chessboard.
translation: 塞莱斯特歪着头、看向天花板，[p/]但很快又被我的棋盘吸引了。

text: Celeste: Wait...[p/] This game is chess, isn't it?
translation: Celeste: 等等……[p/]这是西洋棋，对吧？

text: Celeste: Are you playing against someone?
translation: Celeste: 你在和谁下棋吗？

text: Tyrion: Oh,[p/] I was playing by myself, actually...
translation: Tyrion: 哦，[p/]事实上我只是跟自己在下……

text: Celeste: Oh...
translation: Celeste: 噢……

text: Tyrion: ...Playing alone helps me hone my strategies.[p/] Plenty of professionals do it.
translation: Tyrion: 和自己下棋能磨练我的策略。[p/]很多职业棋士都会这么做。

text: Celeste: Hey,[p/] don’t worry about it.[p/] I’m not the type to shame a man for playing with himself.
translation: Celeste McCoy: 嘛，[p/]别担心。[p/]我又不会因为你在“自娱自乐”就瞧不起你。

text: Tyrion: I-[p/][s/]I—
translation: Tyrion: 我、[p/][s/]我……

text: She just chuckled as she drank in my reaction.
translation: 她看着我的反应，只是轻笑了一声。

text: I looked away from her before clearing my throat.
translation: 我移开视线，清了清嗓子。

text: Tyrion: ...Have you ever played it before?
translation: Tyrion: ……你以前玩过吗？

text: Celeste: I’ve read about it in some books a while ago.
translation: Celeste: 我前段时间在几本书里读到过。

text: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] This room is always so dusty...
translation: Celeste: 呃……[p/]这个房子灰太重了……

text: Inviting herself,[p/] she sat down on the chair opposite mine.
translation: 不请自来，[p/]她坐到我对面的椅子上。

text: She brushed off some dust from the table with her sleeve,[p/] and began setting up her side of the board.
translation: 她用袖子掸去桌上的灰尘，[p/]然后开始摆放她那一侧的棋子。

text: Celeste: Where does the horse go again...?
translation: Celeste: 马是怎么走的来着……？

text: Tyrion: ...Checkmate.
translation: Tyrion: ……将死了。

text: It only took two moves...[p/] She'd fallen into a classic trap.
translation: 仅仅花了两步……[p/]她就栽进了那个经典的陷阱。

text: I felt a little guilty,[p/] but my mentor always said that failure was the best teacher.
translation: 我有点内疚，[p/]但我的导师总是说失败就是最好的老师。

text: Celeste: ...Wait, what?![p/][s/] Already?!
translation: Celeste: .……等等，啊？！[p/][s/]已经结束了？！

text: Celeste: How did you do that?!
translation: Celeste: 你怎么做到的？！

text: I decided against telling her the name of that mate.
translation: 我决定不告诉她那个将杀定势的名字。

text: She just grumbled under her breath as we both moved our pieces back into place.
translation: 我们俩把棋子复位时，她只是低声咕哝了几句。

text: Celeste: So...[p/] What kind of business does your mentor have with my dad?
translation: Celeste: 所以说……[p/]你的导师和我爸爸要谈什么事情？

text: Tyrion: I'm honestly not sure.[p/] She doesn't really tell me much.
translation: Tyrion: 我真的不清楚。[p/]她并没有都告诉我。

text: Tyrion: I think it has something to do with his dissidents against the Crown.
translation: Tyrion: 但我想和他反对国王的行动有关。

text: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

text: Tyrion: ...Sorry,[p/] should I not be saying that out loud?
translation: Tyrion: ……抱歉，[p/]我是不是不该这么大声说出来？

text: Celeste: ...It's fine.
translation: Celeste: ……没关系。

text: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

text: She stroked her chin as her hand moved and hesitated over each of her pieces.
translation: 她抚摸着下巴，一只手在她的几个棋子间游移不定。

text: ...She hadn’t realized that she'd been led into another trap.
translation: ……她还没意识到自己已经掉进了另一个陷阱。

text: Celeste: ...Here!
translation: Celeste: ……就是这里！

text: She moved her knight into position to attack my queen.[p/] She’d blocked my initial assault on her king,[p/] but...
translation: 她走马来威胁我的后。[p/]这本应能阻止我对她国王的威胁意图[p/]然而……

text: Tyrion: Checkmate.
translation: Tyrion: 将死。

text: A Scholar's Mate this time.
translation: 这次是经典的四步将杀。

text: Celeste: What?![p/][s/] How do you keep doing that?!
translation: Celeste: 什么啊？！[p/][s/]你都怎么做到的呀？！

text: Tyrion: The more you play,[p/] the more you'll be able to recognize specific boards.
translation: Tyrion: 你下得越多，[p/]你就越能记牢特定的局面。

text: Tyrion: You'll get the hang of it in time.
translation: Tyrion: 你慢慢就会掌握的。

text: She just glared at the board.
translation: 她一直盯着棋盘。

text: I glanced at the ceiling.[p/] Ms. Tymora and Flinhart's argument was only getting worse.
translation: 我则瞥了一眼天花板。[p/]泰摩拉女士和弗林哈特的争论显然愈发糟糕。

text: It didn’t sound like they would be done anytime soon.
translation: 听起来短时间内结束不了了。

text: Celeste: I figured out what the problem is!
translation: Celeste: 我知道问题在哪里啦！

text: Tyrion: ...Is it that you keep mobilizing your pieces without intention?
translation: Tyrion: .……是说你移动棋子的时候缺乏明确的意图吗？

text: Celeste: It’s food, Tyrion![p/][s/] I need food!
translation: Celeste: 是食物啊，提利昂！[p/][s/]我饿了！

text: She stood up and stomped towards the kitchen,[p/] but not before spinning around back to me.
translation: 她“腾”的一下站起，跺着脚走向厨房，[p/]但走到一半就转过来看着我。

text: Celeste: We’re not done![p/][s/] Don’t you dare leave!
translation: Celeste: 我们还没完呢！[p/][s/]别给我逃跑了！

text: A few minutes later,[p/] she returned carrying a gigantic slab of cooked meat on a small plate.
translation: 几分钟后，[p/]她拿着一个小盘子，装着一大块熟肉回来了。

text: I stared at it for a while,[p/] wondering if she was planning to eat all of that in one sitting.
translation: 我盯着那块肉看了一小会儿，[p/]想着她是否打算要一次性吃完。

text: She began setting up her side of the board with one hand while holding a fork [i]and[/i] knife in the other.
translation: 她坐在棋盘的另一侧，一手下棋，一手[i]同时[/i]拿着一把叉子和一把小刀。

text: She was somehow twirling both utensils in her right hand to switch between them.
translation: 她右手不知怎么调动的，来回使用两个餐具。

text: She delicately carved a small bit of meat with the knife before spinning to a fork to bring it to her mouth.
translation: 她用刀精准地地切下一小块肉，然后又转动叉子送到嘴里。

text: She tilted her head at me and swallowed the bite whole.
translation: 她歪着头看了我一眼，然后把肉块一口吞了下去。

text: Celeste: ...Hey, it's your move.
translation: Celeste: .……嘿，到你了。

text: Tyrion: R-[p/][s/]Right...
translation: Tyrion: 是、[p/][s/]是的……

text: For someone who had never played before,[p/] she was quickly improving with each game.
translation: 对于一个零基础的人来说，[p/]她算进步相当快的了。

text: It took me a while before I even noticed,[p/] but she was adapting to my strategies and trying to use them against me.
translation: 我甚至花了一会儿才注意到，[p/]她已经在模仿我的策略来尝试反制我。

text: She caught me unaware a few times.
translation: 她有几次还抓住了我的疏漏。

text: At the rate she was learning,[p/] she could easily surpass a nationally ranked noble with enough practice.
translation: 以她的学习速度，[p/]只要训练充分，她可以轻易地超越一名拥有全国排名的贵族。

text: Tyrion: Checkmate.
translation: Tyrion: 将死。

text: ...But I’d been playing this game far longer than she had,[p/] and I was ranked far above the average noble.
translation: ……但我下棋比的时间比她长太多了。[p/]而且我的排名远超一般的贵族。

text: She just narrowed her eyes at me.
translation: 她眯着眼睛瞪向我。

text: Celeste: How are you always one step ahead of me?!
translation: Celeste: 你怎么总能知道我下一步要怎么走？！

text: Celeste: It's like you're reading my mind!
translation: Celeste: 就好像你能知道我在想什么一样！

text: I could,[p/] but I never allowed myself to when playing.
translation: 我是可以，[p/]但下棋的时候我从不允许自己这么做。

text: Celeste: I'll get you this time!
translation: Celeste: 这次我会搞定你！

text: She began placing the pieces back in place when my stomach groaned loudly.
translation: 她把棋子复位的时候，我的肚子发出一声响亮的呻吟。

text: Celeste blinked at me,[p/] startled for a moment,[p/] then she giggled.
translation: 塞莱斯特朝我眨了眨眼，[p/]吓了一跳，[p/]然后咯咯地笑了起来。

text: Tyrion: E[p/][s/]-Excuse me...
translation: Tyrion: 不、[p/][s/]不好意思……

text: Celeste: Have you eaten anything?
translation: Celeste: 你没吃东西吗？

text: Tyrion: N-[p/][s/]No...
translation: Tyrion: 没、[p/][s/]没有……

text: Celeste: Oh...
translation: Celeste: 噢……

text: She looked around for a moment before her eyes went to her slab of mystery meat.
translation: 她望了望四周，然后看向她那块不知道是什么的肉。

text: Celeste: Do you want some of this?[p/] We have a lot.
translation: Celeste: 你要来点吗？[p/]我们还有不少。

text: Tyrion: N-[p/][s/]No...[p/] I couldn’t possibly—
translation: Tyrion: 不、[p/][s/]不了……[p/]我不能——

text: My stomach reprimanded me with another loud rumble.
translation: 但我的肚子用又一次响声驳斥了我。

text: Against my protests,[p/] she spun the knife in her hand and carved a bite of meat.
translation: 无视了我的意见，[p/]她转动手中的小刀，切下一块肉。

text: She started to playfully wave the fork in front of my face expectantly.
translation: 她叉起那块肉，然后在我眼前调皮地挥舞起来。

text: Tyrion: ...Do you have another fork?
translation: Tyrion: .……你还有叉子吗？

text: Celeste: Come on,[p/] don't be like that.
translation: Celeste: 拜托，[p/]别这样嘛。

text: I wanted to object,[p/] but I was too hungry to argue.
translation: 我想提出反对，[p/]但我太饿了，没心思争辩。

text: I just bit down on the fork.[p/] That was when I felt quite the jarring texture.
translation: 我一口咬了上去，[p/]然后感到刺人的触感。

text: The meat was tough and fibrous.[p/] I had to consciously chew through the leathery sinew,[p/] lest I choke on it.
translation: 肉质又硬又柴，[p/]我得全神贯注地咀嚼坚韧的肌腱，[p/]要不然肯定会噎着。

text: I’d never tasted such a distinct, greasy tang before.[p/] I realized that I never actually asked her where this meat came from.
translation: 我从没吃过这么独特而油腻的味道。[p/]我这才想起来我还没问过这到底是什么肉。

text: How was she eating this so quickly?
translation: 她怎么能吃得这么快的？

text: Celeste: How is it?
translation: Celeste: 觉得怎样？

text: Tyrion: Well...[p/] I-[p/][s/]It’s certainly...[p/] unique.
translation: Tyrion: 好吧……[p/] 这、[p/][s/]这个确实……[p/]挺独特的。

text: Celeste: Yeah...[p/] Bear meat is kinda weird like that.
translation: Celeste: 也是……[p/]熊肉就是这样有点怪怪的。

text: Tyrion: ...Oh.[p/][s/] Okay.
translation: Tyrion: ……哦。[p/][s/]好吧。

text: As I questioned every decision that had led me to this point,[p/] Ms. Tymora and Flinhart came down from upstairs.
translation: 就在我质疑每一个把自己导向这个局面的决定时，[p/]泰摩拉女士和弗林哈特从楼上下来了。

text: My mentor’s face was stoic as always,[p/] but some frustration bled through.[p/] That was never a good sign.
translation: 导师的表情如同往常一般克制，[p/]但还是流露出一丝失望。[p/]那从来不是好兆头。

text: Celeste: Hi, Dad!
translation: Celeste: 啊，爸爸！

text: Flinhart: Oh...[p/] Hello, sweetie.
translation: Flinhart: 哦……[p/]小宝贝，你好呀。

text: Flinhart’s expression lit up as his daughter rushed over to him.
translation: 看到她的女儿跑过来，弗林哈特的脸色一下子明亮了起来。

text: My mentor glanced at the chessboard on the table.
translation: 我的导师瞥向桌上的棋盘。

text: She never really took an interest in chess,[p/] but she knew that I’d been undefeated since I was ten years old.
translation: 她对西洋棋向来没什么兴趣。[p/]不过她也知道我从10岁起就再没输过了。

text: Ruby: ...Don’t feel too bad about losing to him.[p/] He’s nationally ranked.
translation: Ruby: ……别因为输给他而太难过。[p/]他的水平在全国都排得上号。

text: Celeste: What?![p/][s/] You never told me that!
translation: Celeste: 什么呀？！[p/][s/]你怎么都没说过呢！

text: Celeste: I can't believe you'd exploit a newbie!
translation: Celeste: 不敢相信，你竟然欺负我这个新手！

text: Ruby: If only...
translation: Ruby: 要真是这样倒好了……

text: Celeste: Is that what your suit is for?[p/] Are you some kind of traveling chess player?
translation: Celeste: 这就是你穿西装的原因？[p/]你是什么云游棋士吗？

text: Tyrion: No...[p/] Chess is just a hobby.[p/] I’m a defense attorney.
translation: Tyrion: 不是啦……[p/]下棋只是爱好。[p/]我是一名辩护律师。

text: Celeste: ...I didn't even know we had attorneys in Wyverngarde.
translation: Celeste: ……我都不知道维文加德王国里还有辩护律师呢。

text: They were definitely a dying breed—[p/]the competent ones, anyways.
translation: 这确实是一个正在消失的群体——[p/]至少那些称职的是这样。

text: Ruby: ...Speaking of,[p/] we should probably get going.
translation: Ruby: ……说起来，[p/]我们差不多得走了。

text: Flinhart: Aye...[p/] I hate to refuse you after you came all this way.
translation: Flinhart: 啊，[p/]我真不想让你大老远白跑一趟。

text: Flinhart: I respect what you're doing,[p/] but I won’t work with these mages of yours.
translation: Flinhart: 我衷心对你所做的事业献上敬意，[p/]但我实在不想和你的法师朋友们一起干。

text: Celeste: ... [h="Mages...?" e="sf"/]
translation: Celeste: ……[h="法师?" e="sf"/]

text: Ms. Tymora had mentioned that before.[p/] Was this mystery client a mage?
translation: 泰摩拉女士好像是提到过。[p/]那个神秘的客户原来是个法师吗？

text: Celeste: A-[p/]Anyways,[p/] it’s getting late.
translation: Celeste: 那、[p/]那个，[p/]时间不早了。

text: Celeste: If you leave now,[p/] you probably won't get to the city until morning.
translation: Celeste: 你们现在启程的话，[p/]得走到明早才能到城里。

text: Flinhart: Aye...[p/] She’s right.[p/] These parts are crawling with brigands and conmen.
translation: Flinhart: 嗯……[p/]她说得对。[p/]这地方到处都是强盗和骗子。

text: Flinhart: You wouldn't want to run into one of them after nightfall.
translation: Flinhart: 入夜后遇到他们可没什么好事。

text: Ruby: ...I guess you have a point.
translation: Ruby: ……你说的有道理。

text: Flinhart: The tavern has plenty of empty rooms.[p/] Why don’t you stay here ‘til morning?
translation: Flinhart: 酒馆的空房间有不少。[p/]你们为什么不待到明天天亮呢？

text: Flinhart: ...It’s the least I can do after you came all this way.
translation: Flinhart: .……就当是我补偿你们吧。

text: Ruby: Fine.[p/] I’m not exactly in a rush to get back on that carriage.
translation: Ruby: 好吧。[p/]我确实也不急着回去坐马车。

text: Flinhart: Sweetie...[p/] Can you help me with the—?
translation: Flinhart: 宝贝……[p/]你能帮我——？

text: He paused,[p/] his eyes focusing on the giant slab of meat on the table.
translation: 他突然住了口，[p/]紧盯着桌上那块硕大的肉。

text: Flinhart: ...Did you kill [i]another[/i] bear?!
translation: Flinhart: ……你[i]又[/i]杀了一头熊？！

text: Flinhart: We barely got through the last one!
translation: Flinhart: 我们好不容易才消化掉上一头啊！

text: Flinhart: What are we supposed to do with all of this greasy meat?!
translation: Flinhart: 我们要怎么处理这么多油腻腻的肉呢？！

text: Celeste: Eat it![p/][s/] That’s what it's [i]for[/i]!
translation: Celeste: 吃掉啊！[p/][s/]它不就是[i]用来[/i]吃的吗！

text: Flinhart: How are you even killing these things?!
translation: Flinhart: 你都怎么杀掉它们的？！

text: Celeste: It’s not that hard![p/][s/] You just have to keep up with them!
translation: Celeste: 这又没多难！[p/][s/]只要跟上它的动作就行了呀！

text: Flinhart: For Lord’s sake,[p/][s/] you’re bloody insane...
translation: Flinhart: 鳞主在上啊，[p/][s/]你可真疯狂……

text: Flinhart: Oh...[p/] Why did the Scaled Lord curse me with a rabid wolf instead of a daughter?
translation: Flinhart: 唉……[p/]鳞甲领主为什么诅咒我，让我得到一头疯狼而不是一个正常的女儿？

text: Celeste: This "rabid wolf" is keeping your family fed!
translation: Celeste: 这头“疯狼”可是让全家吃饱了！

text: Celeste: Do you know how many commoners in Wyverngarde are starving?
translation: Celeste: 你知道现在维文加德王国里有多少老百姓饿肚子吗？

text: Flinhart: Don’t talk to me like [i]I’m[/i] the child!
translation: Flinhart: 别用这种把[i]我[/i]当小孩的语气！

text: The two continued their bickering as they went up the staircase.
translation: 他们一边争吵，一边走上楼去。

text: Flinhart: How do you expect to find a good husband while you’re out in the woods wrestling bears?
translation: Flinhart: 你整天就这样在森林里与熊摔跤，怎么找个好丈夫呢？

text: Celeste: Excuse me![p/][s/] Men are [i]lining[/i] up to court me![p/][s/] I am a [i]goddess[/i]!
translation: Celeste: 是哦！[p/][s/]那些男人可是[i]排着队[/i]追求我呢！[p/][s/]他们可是叫我[i]女神[/i]!

text: Flinhart: A goddess of war, more like![p/][s/] You’re always coming home covered in blood and dirt!
translation: Flinhart: 大概是战争女神吧！[p/][s/]你每次回来都带着一身血和泥！

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Tyrion: So...[p/] Your talk with Flinhart didn’t go well?
translation: Tyrion: 所以……[p/]您和弗林哈特的会谈并不愉快吗？

text: Ruby: Why can't he understand that all of this is bigger than him and his vendetta?
translation: Ruby: 为什么他就是不明白，这件事远比他自己和他的私人恩怨重要得多？

text: Tyrion: ...I still have one last thing we could use.
translation: Tyrion: .……我依然可以使用压箱底的那招。

text: Ruby: Cuthbert—
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特——

text: Celeste skipped back downstairs,[p/] pausing upon seeing the air between my mentor and me.
translation: 塞莱斯特一蹦一跳地下楼，[p/]然后感到导师和我之间的气氛就停了下来。

text: Celeste: Oh—[p/][s/] Um...
translation: Celeste: 那个——[p/][s/]嗯……

text: Celeste: We're done with your rooms.[p/] You can head upstairs if you want to rest up.
translation: Celeste: 你们的房间已经清好了。[p/]想休息的话可以上楼来。

text: Ruby: ...Right.
translation: Ruby: ……好的。

text: Tyrion: ...Thank you, Celeste.
translation: Tyrion: ……谢谢你，塞莱斯特。

text: Silence followed us up the stairs until we arrived at our rooms.
translation: 我们在沉默中走上楼梯，就这么走到房门前。

text: Ms. Tymora’s hand gripped the handle of the door,[p/] but she never turned it.
translation: 泰摩拉女士握住门把手，[p/]但没有按下去。

text: Ruby: ...I'm sorry.[p/] I didn't expect our discussion to go for that long.
translation: Ruby: .……抱歉。[p/]我没想到这次谈话会持续这么久。

text: Tyrion: ...It's fine.[p/] I understand.
translation: Tyrion: ……没事。[p/]我理解。

text: Ruby: I saw you playing chess with Flinhart's daughter earlier.[p/] Was everything okay?
translation: Ruby: 我看到你之前是在和弗林哈特的女儿下棋吧。[p/]没什么问题吧？

text: Tyrion: What do you mean?
translation: Tyrion: 这有什么问题吗？

text: Ruby: ...You're kind of a sore winner when you play.
translation: Ruby: 你赢棋的时候有点喜欢摆谱。

text: Tyrion: O-[p/][s/]Only when my opponent's a noble.
translation: Tyrion: 那、[p/][s/]那只限于对手是贵族的时候。

text: Tyrion: ...She caught on quickly.[p/] She was ridiculously good for a beginner.
translation: Tyrion: .……她进步很快。[p/]作为一名初学者来说好得不可思议。

text: Tyrion: Playing against her was nice.
translation: Tyrion: 与她对弈还挺愉快的。

text: Ruby: Well...[p/] I suppose you [i]are[/i] at that age.
translation: Ruby: 好吧……[p/]看来你[i]确实[/i]到了这种年纪了。

text: Tyrion: N-[p/][s/]No![p/][s/] That's not what I meant!
translation: Tyrion: 不、[p/][s/]不对！[p/][s/] 我不是那个意思！

text: Tyrion: I never really get to play against other players outside of tournaments…
translation: Tyrion: 我没怎么在比赛之外与其他人下过棋……

text: Tyrion: And [i]you[/i] only ever want to play Shogi against me.
translation: Tyrion: 而[i]你[/i]只肯和我下将棋。

text: Ruby: Because Shogi is clearly superior.
translation: Ruby: 因为将棋就是更高级啊。

text: Tyrion: It’s complete anarchy,[p/][s/] is what it is!
translation: Tyrion: 根本就是打乱战，[p/][s/]完全没有道理好吧！

text: Tyrion: You just bring fallen pieces back to life like some kind of necromancer.
translation: Tyrion: 将棋规则就像什么死灵术，吃掉的棋子还能拿回来用的。

text: Ruby: It adds depth.[p/][s/] Dropping adds a dimension of play that isn't present in chess.
translation: Ruby: 将棋更有深度，[p/][s/]“打入”也是西洋棋所没有的维度。

text: We both glared at each other silently,[p/] but all of the tension from before had left.
translation: 我们又沉默地盯着对方，[p/]但之前紧张的情绪已经消去了。

text: After a few moments,[p/] we just both burst out laughing.
translation: 几许寂静后，[p/] 我们同时笑出了声。

text: Ruby: ...You really have grown up, haven't you?
translation: Ruby: .……你真大长大了， 不是吗？

text: Ruby: You must’ve been only ten when you suddenly showed up at my house.
translation: Ruby: 你突然出现在我家的时候，就只有十岁。

text: Tyrion: ...That was a long time ago.
translation: Tyrion: .……那确实是很久以前了。

text: She stayed silent for a moment.
translation: 她又沉默片刻。

text: Ruby: ...I know that you're just trying to help.
translation: Ruby: ……我知道你是想帮我忙。

text: Tyrion: Then why won’t you let me?
translation: Tyrion: 那为什么不让我来呢？

text: Ruby: Cuthbert,[p/] it's not the right time.
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特， [p/]现在还不是时候。

text: Tyrion: I’m ready for this, Ms. Tymora.
translation: Tyrion: 我早已准备好了，泰摩拉女士。

text: Ruby: You are.[p/] I know you are.
translation: Ruby: 是的。[p/]我知道。

text: That just made me raise an eyebrow at her.
translation: 这句话让我不禁对着她睁大了眼。

text: Tyrion: ...Then what's the issue here?
translation: Tyrion: ……那还有什么问题呢？

text: Again,[p/] she just stayed silent.
translation: 然而，[p/]她再一次闭口不言。

text: Ruby: ...Get some rest.[p/] You’ll need to prepare for the journey tomorrow.
translation: Ruby: .……去休息吧。[p/]你需要为明天的旅行做准备。

text: I winced at that thought.[p/] I’d completely forgotten that I’d have to wrangle those horses again...
translation: 我一想到这个就皱起了眉头。[p/]全然忘了自己又要驯服那几匹马……

text: I opened the door and fell onto the bed inside.
translation: 我打开门，然后躺在床上。

text: It wasn't long before night fell.[p/] Between driving that carriage and dealing with those con artists,[p/] I was exhausted.
translation: 马上就要天黑了。[p/]又是驾驶马车、又是对付骗子，[p/]我确实非常疲惫。

text: I fell asleep,[p/] but I felt uneasiness creep into me as the night went on.
translation: 我沉沉地入睡，[p/]但随着夜色渐深，一阵不安悄然袭来。

text: I felt myself being pulled away,[p/] brought elsewhere.
translation: 我感觉自己好像是被拉了起来，[p/]被带到什么其他地方。

text: In every direction I looked,[p/] there was nothing—[p/]only the glass-like floor I was standing on.
translation: 看向四周，[p/]什么都没有——[p/]只有我脚下玻璃似地地面。

text: I saw my reflection in the floor.[p/] With each step I took,[p/] it rippled and shimmered.
translation: 我在地板上看到自己的倒影。[p/]每走一步，[p/]它就泛起涟漪，闪烁光芒。

text: I knew that I was dreaming,[p/] but something deep inside me insisted that there was something real about this.
translation: 我知道我在做梦，[p/]但我潜意识里又清楚眼前的景象是真实存在的。

text: Whispers echoed through the realm.[p/] I spotted the small, dark silhouette of a person in the distance.
translation: 低语声在空间里回想。[p/]我在远处注意到一个黑暗的小小身影。

text: She was silently staring at me and murmuring something under her breath.
translation: 她安静地盯着我，低声嘟囔着什么。

text: She repeated the same phrase,[p/] almost like a chant.
translation: 她重复着同样的短句，[p/]几乎像某种咏唱。

text: She looked practically giddy in anticipation of...[p/] [i]something[/i].
translation: 她看起来欣喜若狂，好像是在期盼着……[p/][i]什么[/i]。

text: Eris: [j]I've finally found you, heavensborn![/j][p/][p/][p/]
translation: Eris: [j]我终于找到你了，天诞之物！[/j][p/][p/][p/]

text: I woke up to the sound of shouting from downstairs.
translation: 我被楼下传来的吼叫声吵醒。

text: I clutched at my chest.[p/] My heart was racing,[p/] and I was drenched in sweat.
translation: 我捂紧胸口，[p/]心脏怦怦地跳动着，[p/]而且浑身是汗。

text: That was just a nightmare...[p/] I tried to convince myself of that.
translation: 那只是一场噩梦……[p/]我试图说服自己。

text: I shook my head.[p/] Something else was happening downstairs.
translation: 我摇了摇头，[p/]楼下肯定发生了什么事。

text: Those voices sounded like Celeste's and Flinhart's,[p/] and they were only getting louder.
translation: 听起来像是塞莱斯特和弗林哈特的声音。[p/]他们的声音越来越高。

text: Celeste: Please![p/][s/] Just let me explain!
translation: Celeste: 求你了！[p/][s/]让我解释一下就好！

text: Flinhart: I don’t want to hear it!
translation: Flinhart: 我不想听！

text: They definitely weren’t bickering about the bear meat this time...
translation: 他们这次肯定不是在吵熊肉的事情……

text: Flinhart: I WANT YOU OUT OF MY HOUSE![p/][s/] GET OUT!
translation: Flinhart: <size=1.5em>你给我滚出去！</size>[p/][s/]<size=1.5em>滚出去！</size>

text: After that,[p/] there was only silence,[p/] followed by someone storming out of the tavern.
translation: 这之后，[p/]就只剩下沉默，[p/]听起来又有人冲出了酒馆。

text: The front door of the tavern slammed shut,[p/] the entire structure swaying from the force.
translation: 酒馆的大门被重重地摔上，[p/]整栋屋子都跟着摇晃起来。

text: I lay there silent.[p/] What could they be arguing about this late at night?
translation: 我一言不发地躺着，[p/]他们这么晚了还在吵什么呢？

text: It really wasn’t any of my business.
translation: 这不关我的事。

text: Celeste: Hi, Dad!
translation: Celeste: 啊，爸爸！

text: Flinhart: Oh...[p/] Hello, sweetie.
translation: Flinhart: 哦……[p/]小宝贝，你好呀。

text: Flinhart’s expression lit up as his daughter rushed over to him.
translation: 看到她的女儿跑过来，弗林哈特的脸色一下子明亮了起来。

text: Tyrion: [i]*sigh*[/i].
translation: Tyrion: [i]*叹气*[/i].

text: The door creaked loudly as I eased it open and stepped out of my room.
translation: 我轻轻推开门，门发出刺耳的吱呀声，然后我走出了房间。

text: The hallway was completely dark.[p/] Not a single candle was lit.
translation: 走廊一片漆黑，[p/]连枝蜡烛都没点。

text: I stepped forward slowly,[p/] careful not to trip over anything.
translation: 我慢慢向前走去，[p/]小心不被什么东西绊倒。

text: Flinhart: ...!
translation: Flinhart: ……！

text: Flinhart was trudging up the stairs when I bumped into him.
translation: 我正好撞见弗林哈特拖着沉重的步伐上楼来。

text: I couldn’t see his face,[p/] but judging from how he sounded earlier,[p/] I probably didn’t want to.
translation: 我看不到他的脸色，[p/]但考虑到之前听到的动静，[p/]我大概也不太想看。

text: Tyrion: Sorry...
translation: Tyrion: 对不起……

text: Flinhart: Right...[p/] I forgot you two were—
translation: Flinhart: 哈啊……[p/]我忘了你们两个还在这——

text: His voice trailed off.
translation: 他的声音低落下去。

text: Tyrion: ...Is everything okay?
translation: Tyrion: ……你还好吗？

text: Flinhart: ...
translation: Flinhart: ……

text: Tyrion: ...Sorry,[p/] I’m just going to—
translation: Tyrion: ……对不起啊，[p/]我只是想——

text: I slid past Flinhart as I went down the stairs.[p/] He barely even noticed.
translation: 我从弗林哈特身边挤过去走下了楼，[p/]他几乎都没注意到。

text: I made my way to the dining room.[p/] There weren't any lights in the streets.[p/] It was nearly pitch black.
translation: 我摸索着走进餐厅。[p/]这里也没什么灯光。[p/]举目一片漆黑。

text: Tyrion: ...Hello?
translation: Tyrion: ..……有人吗？

text: No answer.[p/] I looked at the entrance to the tavern.
translation: 无人回应。[p/]我看向酒馆的入口。

text: The door was hanging open.[p/] The wooden frame was cracked.
translation: 大门半开着。[p/]木制的门框已经裂开了。

text: I walked through the village streets,[p/] but there weren't any lights on.[p/] I regretted not taking a lantern on my way out.
translation: 我穿过门框走上村庄街头，[p/]但外面也没有灯。[p/]我后悔没把提灯一起拿出来。

text: I heard a squelch as I accidentally stepped on something that was disgustingly soft.[p/] I tried my best to ignore it.
translation: 我不小心踩到了什么东西，发出“噗嗤”一声，那东西软得令人作呕。[p/]我尽量忽略它。

text: Tyrion: ...Celeste?
translation: Tyrion: ……塞莱斯特？

text: Tyrion: Celeste?![p/][s/] Where are you?!
translation: Tyrion: 塞莱斯特？！[p/][s/]你在哪儿？！

text: A groan echoed from one of the nearby shacks.[p/] A lantern flickered to life from behind the wooden door.
translation: 附近一间小屋里传来一声呻吟。[p/]小屋的木门里突然亮起一盏灯笼。

text: An older man stepped out,[p/] squinting against the darkness of the night.
translation: 一位老人走出来，[p/]眯眼看着外面的夜色。

text: Peasant: ...You got any idea what time it is?
translation: Peasant: ……你知道现在是几点吗？

text: He eyed me up and down,[p/] taking notice of how I was dressed.
translation: 他从上到下打量我一番，[p/]注意到我的穿着。

text: Peasant: This ain’t the city, boy.[p/] We like our peace and quiet after sundown.
translation: Peasant: 这可不是城里啊，小伙子。[p/]太阳下山后我们就都休息了。

text: Tyrion: R-[p/][s/]Right...[p/] Sorry.[p/] I was just looking for Celeste.
translation: Tyrion: 是、[p/][s/]是的……[p/]我道歉。[p/]我只是在找塞莱斯特。

text: Peasant: ...Who?
translation: Peasant: ……你说谁？

text: Tyrion: Celeste McCoy.[p/] She’s Flinhart’s daughter.
translation: Tyrion: 塞莱斯特·麦考伊，[p/]她是弗林哈特的女儿。

text: Something in his expression shifted.[p/] Irritation turned into complete contempt.
translation: 他神色一变，[p/]从恼怒变成了彻底的蔑视。

text: Tyrion: ...Do you know her?
translation: Tyrion: ……您知道她吗？

text: Peasant: What do you want with that bastard? [h="That damned mage..." e="a"/]
translation: Peasant: 你要找那个野种做什么？ [h="那个该死的法师……" e="a"/]

text: Tyrion: What...?
translation: Tyrion: 什么……？

text: Peasant: Those two probably woke up half the town with their yelling.
translation: Peasant: 他们俩的大喊大叫快把半个村子都吵醒了。

text: Tyrion: ...Look,[p/] I just want to make sure that she's safe.
translation: Tyrion: ……是这样，[p/]我只是想确保她还安全。

text: Peasant: Ha![p/] You've got nothing to worry about there.
translation: Peasant: 哈！[p/]那你不用担心了。

text: Before I could get another word in,[p/] he went back into his house in a huff,[p/] slamming the door behind him.
translation: 我还没来得及开口，[p/]他迅速地走进屋内，[p/]砰地一声关上了门。

text: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ..……

text: I just took a breath and continued searching.
translation: 我叹了口气，继续搜寻。

text: Flinhart: ...
translation: Flinhart: ……

text: Garrick: Still have that famous temper, I see.
translation: Garrick: 你脾气还是那么大啊。

text: Flinhart: ...You?!
translation: Flinhart: ……是你？！

text: Garrick: Honestly,[p/] I never understood how you could stand living in this gloomy shack.
translation: Garrick: 说实话嘛，[p/]我一直不明白你怎么能忍受住在这种阴暗的小屋子里。

text: Garrick: [b]Luxo[/b].
translation: Garrick: [b]Luxo[/b]。

text: Flinhart: How [i]dare[/i] you use that witchcraft in my home?!
translation: Flinhart: 你怎么[i]敢[/i]在我家里用那种巫术？！

text: Garrick: From what I've seen,[p/] I'm not the first.
translation: Garrick: 就我所见，[p/]我应该不是第一位。

text: Flinhart: ...
translation: Flinhart: ……

text: Garrick: You’ve really been stirring the pot.
translation: Garrick: 你还真是搞出不少麻烦事。

text: Garrick: The Four Pillars don’t care for what they’ve been hearing from your rallies.
translation: Garrick: 四大支柱也不会在乎你们在集会上的那些言论。

text: Flinhart: Is that right?[p/] I’ll be sure to bring that up at the next meeting.
translation: Flinhart: 是这样吗？[p/]那我下次会议就要把这个情况告诉大家。

text: Garrick: ...For Lord's sake![p/][s/] Have some sense, Flinhart!
translation: Garrick: .……看在鳞主的份上！[p/][s/]有点常识好吗，弗林哈特！

text: Garrick: At this rate,[p/] you're going to bring Lucio Steelwind down on [i]all[/i] of us!
translation: Garrick: 照这样下去，[p/]你就要招来卢西奥·斯蒂尔文德，那时候[i]我们[/i]就全完了！

text: Garrick: [i]You[/i] may not value your life,[p/] but I will not become another one of his "casualties".
translation: Garrick: [i]你自己[/i]可能还不在乎姓名，[p/]但我可不想出现在他的“击杀名单”上。

text: Flinhart: So you came all this way to convince me to stop?
translation: Flinhart: 所以你专门过来就是为了劝我收手？

text: Garrick: ...End this foolishness now,[p/] and no harm will come to you or your family.[p/] You have my word.
translation: Garrick: ……停止这些愚蠢的行为。[p/]你的家人就不会收到任何伤害。[p/]我向你保证。

text: Flinhart: Hah![p/] Your "word" is as good as the dirt you lick off the King’s boots.
translation: Flinhart: 哼！[p/]你的“保证”可不比你舔着国王的靴子上的泥巴好到哪里去！

text: Flinhart: You’re a killer.[p/] As if I’d ever trust you.
translation: Flinhart: 你是个杀人凶手。[p/]我怎么可能相信你。

text: Garrick: ...
translation: Garrick: ……

text: Garrick: Flinhart, please.[p/] As someone who once thought of you as a friend,[p/] I’m only going to ask you once.
translation: Garrick: 拜托了，弗林哈特。[p/]作为曾经同你以“朋友”相处的人，[p/]我最后问你一次。

text: Flinhart: ..."Friend"?[p/][s/] "[i]Friend[/i]"?!
translation: Flinhart: .……“朋友”？[p/][s/]你是说 “[i]朋友[/i]”？！

text: Flinhart: I’ll be dead in the ground before I ever call the likes of you a "friend"!
translation: Flinhart: 我宁愿死了埋在地里也不会称你这种人为“朋友”！

text: Flinhart: Get out of my house.[p/] I don’t have time for you.
translation: Flinhart: 从我的房子里滚出去。[p/]我没时间搭理你。

text: Garrick: ...
translation: Garrick: ……

text: Garrick: ...I don’t think you’ll have much time for anything.
translation: Garrick: ……我想你也没有“搭理”任何人的时间了。

text: Flinhart: GAH!
translation: Flinhart: 噶啊！

text: Garrick: ...
translation: Garrick: ……

text: Garrick: Damn it all!
translation: Garrick: 该死!!

text: Garrick: You stubborn fool![p/][s/] Why couldn’t you have just listened to me?!
translation: Garrick: 你这个蠢蛋！[p/][s/]你怎么就不能听我的话呢？！

text: Garrick: ...
translation: Garrick: ……

text: Garrick: Rudolf!
translation: Garrick: 鲁道夫！

text: Rhys: ...Yes, sir?
translation: Rhys: ……有何吩咐？

text: Rhys: By the Scaled Lord![p/][s/] What did you—?!
translation: Rhys: 以鳞甲领主之名啊！[p/][s/]您这是——？！

text: Rhys: You...[p/][s/] killed him?!
translation: Rhys: 您……[p/][s/]杀了他？！

text: Garrick: ...
translation: Garrick: ……

text: Garrick: Alert the Inquisition.[p/] Tell them that you saw his daughter fleeing the scene.
translation: Garrick: 向裁判所报案。[p/]告诉他们你看见他女儿逃离了现场。

text: Garrick: I’m sure their neighbors heard them yelling at each other.
translation: Garrick: 邻居们肯定都听到他们相互大声吼叫了。

text: Rhys: ...
translation: Rhys: ……

text: Rhys: Understood, sir.
translation: Rhys: 明白了，阁下。

text: Celeste: ...What am I going to do?
translation: Celeste: ……我该怎么办？

text: Celeste: O-[p/][s/]Oh...!
translation: Celeste: 哦、[p/][s/]哦……！

text: A few hours had already passed,[p/] but I finally found her sitting under an old oak tree.
translation: 又过了几个小时，[p/]我最终发现她坐在一株老橡树底下。

text: She looked just as tired as I was,[p/] probably even more so.
translation: 她看起来和我一样疲惫，[p/]甚至还比我更厉害。

text: Her eyes were wet and red,[p/] but she quickly wiped them with her sleeve as she stood up to meet me.
translation: 她的双眼泪水晶莹、充满红丝，[p/]但她马上用袖子擦去眼泪，站起来走向我。

text: Tyrion: ...I've been looking for you.
translation: Tyrion: .……我到处找你。

text: Celeste: Oh...[p/] Did we wake you up?
translation: Celeste: 啊……[p/]我们把你吵醒了？

text: Tyrion: ...I just wanted to make sure you were okay.
translation: Tyrion: ……我只是想确信你还好。

text: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

text: Celeste: It’s nothing.[p/] We argue like that all of the time... [h="Please just go away." e="sa"/]
translation: Celeste: 没事的。[p/]我们经常像这样吵架……[h="希望你就这么离开吧。" e="sa"/]

text: Celeste: I’m fine.[p/] See?
translation: Celeste: 我很好。[p/]看吧？

text: She tried to squeeze her lips into a smile,[p/] but it didn’t reach her eyes.
translation: 她试图用嘴唇挤出微笑，[p/]但控制不了自己的眼神。

text: Celeste: You should really head back.[p/] It’s not safe to be out here this late.
translation: Celeste: 你真的该回去了。[p/]这里的深夜可不安全。

text: Tyrion: ...What about you?
translation: Tyrion: ……那你呢？

text: Celeste: ...I can take care of myself.
translation: Celeste: ……我照顾得了自己。

text: I just stood there silently for a moment.
translation: 我有原地伫立了一会儿。

text: Tyrion: ...I'm sure he just lost his temper.
translation: Tyrion: ……我相信他只是一时间没控制住自己的情绪。

text: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

text: Celeste: You don’t know that. [h="Mind your own business..." e="sa"/]
translation: Celeste: 你不清楚内情。[h="管好你自己的事……" e="sa"/]

text: Tyrion: S-[p/][s/]Sorry...
translation: Tyrion: 那、[p/][s/]对不起……

text: She just looked down and said nothing before exhaling.
translation: 她低下头，什么也没说，然后叹了口气。

text: Celeste: ...Maybe you’re right.
translation: Celeste: .……可能你说得对。

text: Celeste: It wouldn't feel right to let you walk back alone anyway.
translation: Celeste: 让你又一个人走回去感觉也不太好。

text: She walked past me,[p/] leading me back to the tavern.
translation: 她从我身旁走过，[p/]领着我向酒馆走回去。

text: Tyrion: ...What?
translation: Tyrion: ……怎么了？

text: We returned,[p/] but found the tavern surrounded by knights clad in plate armor.
translation: 当我们回到酒馆，[p/]它四周已经被全副武装的骑士们包围了。

text: Several carriages were parked outside,[p/] and I could see several lights lit within the tavern.
translation: 好几驾马车停在门外，[p/]而我能看到酒馆里面已经点起好几盏灯。

text: Tyrion: ...Is that the Arcane Inquisition?
translation: Tyrion: .……那不是奥术裁判所吗？

text: Celeste: Inquisition...?
translation: Celeste: 裁判所……？

text: Tyrion: They're an order of knights who investigate crimes committed using magic.
translation: Tyrion: 他们是一群负责调查涉及魔法的刑事案件骑士组成的。

text: Celeste and I shared a glance.[p/] Without another word,[p/] both of us ran towards the tavern,[p/] but she quickly outpaced me.
translation: 塞莱斯特和我对视一眼，[p/]没再多说，[p/]我们同时冲向酒馆，[p/]她又轻易地把我抛在后面。

text: Celeste: ...What?[p/] N-[p/][s/]No...
translation: Celeste: ……什么？[p/]不、[p/][s/]不要……

text: She reached the tavern door,[p/] and the color drained from her face.
translation: 她扶着酒馆的大门，[p/]脸色一下子变得苍白。

text: Her hand went to her mouth as she stumbled backwards,[p/] her body shuddering.
translation: 她用手捂紧嘴巴，摇摇晃晃地向后退去，[p/]，全身筛糠似的颤抖。

text: Celeste: D-[p/][s/]Dad...?
translation: Celeste: 爸、[p/][s/]爸爸……？

text: Her voice quivered.[p/] Tears began to stream down her face.
translation: 她声音颤抖着，[p/]眼泪不住地从脸颊上流下。

text: Orym: There you are!
translation: Orym: 你在这儿哪！

text: As Celeste stood there, frozen,[p/] a knight stepped between her and the tavern entrance.
translation: 就在塞莱斯特僵立原地的时候，[p/]一个骑士走到她与酒馆入口中间。

text: Orym: Celeste McCoy![p/][s/] By the authority of the Wyverngarde crown,[p/][s/] I'm placing you under arrest!
translation: Orym: 塞莱斯特·麦考伊！[p/][s/]以维文加德王室的名义，[p/][s/]我在此将你逮捕！

text: The knight tried to grab her arm,[p/] and it was like something flipped inside of her.
translation: 那名骑士试图抓住她的手臂，[p/]但她体内似乎发生了什么颠覆性的变化。

text: She slammed her palm into the knight's chest,[p/] his plate armour reverberating as he was launched several feet backwards.
translation: 她一掌打在骑士的胸前，[p/]板甲发出震耳欲聋的响声，他也不由自主地后退好几步。

text: Three other knights rushed forward.[p/] They tried to grab her and pin her to the ground.
translation: 又有三名骑士冲上前，[p/]想抓住并将她压制在地。

text: She let out a guttural scream against them,[p/] almost sounding like a feral animal.
translation: 她冲三人发出嘶哑的尖叫，[p/]听起来仿佛野兽。

text: It looked like it was taking all of their strength to keep her pinned down.
translation: 看起来他们不得不费尽全力才能勉强压制住她。

text: It was like she was a completely different person.[p/] I stood there stunned before shaking myself out of it.
translation: 好像她完全变了一个人。[p/]我呆立在那里，愣了好一会儿才回过神来。

text: Tyrion: What are you doing to her?![p/][s/] Let her go!
translation: Tyrion: 你们要对她做什么？！[p/][s/]放她起来！

text: Ruby: ...Tyrion!
translation: Ruby: ……提利昂！

text: Thank the Scaled Lord...[p/] Ms. Tymora was safe.
translation: 感谢鳞甲领主……[p/]泰摩拉女士是安全的。

text: Orym: [i]Tch[/i]![p/] I knew I recognized him from somewhere.
translation: Orym: [i]嘁[/i]！[p/]我就说我应该在哪里见过这家伙。

text: Orym: Stay out of our way,[p/][s/] or we’ll lock you two up right next to her.
translation: Orym: 滚开，[p/][s/]要不然我就把你们俩铐在她边上。

text: He left in a huff,[p/] following after the other knights as they slowly dragged Celeste away.
translation: 他跟着那些那些慢慢拖走塞莱斯特的骑士们，[p/]气冲冲地离去。

text: Tyrion: Ms. Tymora...[p/][s/] What's going on?![p/][s/] Why is the Arcane Inquisition here?!
translation: Tyrion: 泰摩拉女士……[p/][s/]发生什么了？！[p/][s/]为什么奥术裁判所在这里？！

text: Ruby: ...I'm not sure,[p/] but...[p/] Flinhart is dead.
translation: Ruby: ……我也不清楚，[p/]但是……[p/]弗林哈特死了。

text: Tyrion: What?!
translation: Tyrion: 什么？！

text: :Celeste was going to be detained in Ratholme:[p/] Wyverngarde's capital city.
translation: :塞莱斯特将被带到瑞思霍姆：[p/]维文加德王国的首都并拘留起来。

text: She was apparently the prime suspect in Flinhart’s murder.
translation: 她显然成为了弗林哈特谋杀案的头号嫌疑人。

text: Her case would be pushed to trial within the day.[p/] Supposedly,[p/] they discovered traces of magic at the crime scene.
translation: 她的案件将在一日内召开审理。[p/]而且裁判所应该在犯罪现场发现了魔法痕迹。

text: That honestly just raised even more questions...
translation: 说实话，这反而引出更多问题……

text: Ms. Tymora and I were determined to get to the bottom of this.
translation: 泰摩拉女士和我决定追根问底。

text: The Inquisition,[p/] on the other hand,[p/] did what they always did...
translation: 而裁判所的做法，[p/]行事风格一如既往……

text: Ruby: This is ridiculous.[p/] She has a right to speak to an attorney.
translation: Ruby: 太荒谬了。[p/]她有与律师沟通的权利。

text: Orym: Yeah...[p/] Well,[p/] we can’t let you see her until she’s been processed.
translation: Orym: 对对对……[p/]不过呢，[p/]她办理完相关手续前可不能与你们相见。

text: Orym White was the commander of the Arcane Inquisition.[p/] Ms. Tymora had supposedly run into him many times.
translation: 奥蒙·怀特是奥术裁判所的指挥官。[p/]泰摩拉女士已跟他见过好几次了。

text: He always looked like the textbook definition of someone who was "too old for this".
translation: 他看起来总是一副教科书般的“早该退休”的模样。

text: I didn't usually accompany Ms. Tymora to her crime scenes,[p/] but the few times I had,[p/] he was always there to run interference.
translation: 我不经常陪伴泰摩拉女士调查犯罪现场，[p/]但有那么几次去了的场合，[p/]他总是在那里制造阻碍。

text: He always looked like he cared more about making trouble for us than actually doing his job.
translation: 他看起来总是更注重给我们制造麻烦，而不是认真工作。

text: The Inquisition was deep in the nobility's pockets.[p/] I'd always assumed that they were paying him to sabotage us.
translation: 毕竟裁判所与贵族勾结匪浅。[p/]我一直觉得就是贵族付钱给他来破坏我们的工作。

text: Ruby: Don’t give me that.[p/] There's no way you haven't processed her with the trial this close.
translation: Ruby: 别跟我来这一套。[p/]马上就要开庭了，你们不可能还没办完手续。

text: Orym: Yeah?[p/] Well,[p/] unless you can prove it,[p/] I don’t need to do anything.
translation: Orym: 是吗？[p/]好啊，[p/]除非你有证据，[p/]我什么都不需要做。

text: Aria: ...What’s with all of this noise?
translation: Aria: .……在吵什么呢？

text: The commander’s back straightened out,[p/] his smirk turning into a wince as the girl walked into the chambers.
translation: 指挥官挺直了背脊，[p/]当一个女孩子走入房间时，他脸上的冷笑变成了畏缩的表情。

text: Whoever she was,[p/] she must've been younger than me.
translation: 我不知道她是谁，[p/]但看起来肯定比我还小。

text: Despite that,[p/] her voice carried the weight of her authority[p/]—something which Orym clearly relented to.
translation: 即便如此，[p/]她的声音也承载着足够的威严——[p/]而奥蒙显然对此作出让步。

text: Her aura was as cold and rigid as stone.[p/] Her disposition was probably equally so.
translation: 她的气场有如磐石，冷峻而坚硬。[p/]她的性情大概也同样如此。

text: Ruby: Celeste McCoy has a right to counsel,[p/] and I’m—
translation: Ruby: 塞莱斯特·麦考伊有接受辩护的权利，[p/]而我是——

text: Aria: I know who you are, Ruby Tymora.
translation: Aria: 我知道你是谁，鲁比·泰摩拉。

text: She turned to Orym.[p/] She was almost half his size,[p/] but he was practically flinching at her every word.
translation: 她转向奥蒙，[p/]她几乎只有奥蒙一半高，[p/]但奥蒙几乎为她的每一句话退缩。

text: Orym: O-[p/][s/]Oh,[p/][s/] uh—[p/] Well,[p/] the girl hasn’t been processed yet—
translation: Orym: 哦、[p/][s/]噢，[p/][s/]呃——[p/]好吧，[p/]那个女孩子的手续还没有——

text: She just let out an irritated sigh as she waved him away.
translation: 她不耐烦地叹了口气，挥手让他走开。

text: Aria: Let them through.
translation: Aria: 让他们过去。

text: Orym: What...?[p/][s/] But—!
translation: Orym: 什么……？[p/][s/]但是——！

text: Aria: Let them through before I throw you into the cell next to hers.
translation: Aria: 如果你不想被我扔到她隔壁的牢房，就放他们过去。

text: Orym: Y-[p/][s/]Yes, Lady—[p/][s/] Erm...[p/][s/] I mean...[p/][s/] [i]Ms.[/i] Steelwind...
translation: Orym: 好、[p/][s/]好的，小姐——[p/][s/]呃……[p/][s/]我是说……[p/][s/]斯蒂尔文德[i]女士[/i]……

text: ..."Steelwind"?
translation: ……“斯蒂尔文德”？

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: She gave me a passing glance as if she were silently appraising me.[p/] She walked out of the dungeons without another word.
translation: 她瞥了我一眼，似乎是在默默地打量我。[p/] 然后她一言不发地走出了地牢。

text: Orym grumbled under his breath as he led us to Celeste’s cell.
translation: 奥蒙嘟囔了一句，然后把我们带到塞莱斯特的牢房前。

text: I had to wade through a thickening fog of emotions as we descended further into the dungeons.
translation: 随着我们继续深入地牢，宛如浓雾般愈发浓重的情绪向我涌来，我不得不努力忍受。

text: The collective anger and sorrow of the prisoners was choking me.
translation: 囚徒们聚集的愤怒与悲伤几乎令我窒息。

text: I'd always hated crowds.[p/] I could never shut out the storm of thoughts and emotions that came with them.
translation: 我向来厌恶人群。[p/]我始终无法摆脱他们传来的种种思绪和情感。

text: But I tried my best to keep it together.[p/] Celeste was going through a lot more than I was.
translation: 但我尽力保持镇定。[p/]塞莱斯特此时比我更难过得多。

text: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

text: Celeste: O-[p/][s/]Oh!
translation: Celeste: 哦、[p/][s/]啊！

text: Celeste was curled up on the cold floor,[p/] arms wrapped around her knees.
translation: 塞莱斯特蜷缩在冰冷的地板上，[p/]两手环抱着膝盖。

text: When she saw us,[p/] she scrambled to her feet.
translation: 她看到我们后，[p/] 赶紧站了起来。

text: Celeste: ...What are you doing here?
translation: Celeste: ……你们怎么来了？

text: Ruby: We know about what happened to your father...
translation: Ruby: 我们知道你父亲的不幸……

text: Tyrion: ...I’m so sorry, Celeste.
translation: Tyrion: ……节哀顺变。塞莱斯特。

text: Celeste: ... [h="I still can't believe it..." e="sfa"/]
translation: Celeste: …… [h="我到现在都无法相信……" e="sfa"/]

text: Celeste: ...Thanks.
translation: Celeste: ……谢谢。

text: Her response came out hollowly.
translation: 她的回应很空虚。

text: Ruby: You’re the Inquisition’s prime suspect in the murder,[p/] and they’re planning to push your case to trial.
translation: Ruby: 你被裁判所列为谋杀案的头号嫌疑人，[p/]而他们正打算把案件提交庭审。

text: Ruby: You’ll be brought to court in a few hours.
translation: Ruby: 几小时后你就会被带到法庭上。

text: Celeste: What?![p/][s/] No one told me anything!
translation: Celeste: 什么？！[p/][s/]没人告诉我啊！

text: My mentor scoffed in disgust.[p/] She was all too familiar with this.
translation: 我的导师发出厌恶的嗤笑。[p/]她太熟悉这一套做法了。

text: Ruby: They were planning to convict you before you even [i]realized[/i] you were on trial.
translation: Ruby: 按照他们的计划，在你[i]意识到[/i]自己已经站上法庭之前，就已经作出有罪判决了。

text: Tyrion: Celeste,[p/] Ms. Tymora is the best defense attorney in Wyverngarde.[p/] She can help you.
translation: Tyrion: 塞莱斯特，[p/]泰摩拉女士是全维文加德最好的辩护律师。[p/]她一定帮得到你。

text: Ruby: You’ve been supporting your family from your work as a mercenary.[p/] Is that correct?
translation: Ruby: 你为了维持家计一直在当雇佣兵，[p/]我说得对吧？

text: ...Did she just say "mercenary"?
translation: ……她刚刚说了“雇佣兵”吗？

text: Ruby: From your financial history,[p/] it appears that you can afford my services.
translation: Ruby: 根据你的收入记录，[p/]你应该付得起我的服务费。

text: Celeste: How would you even know that?
translation: Celeste: 你又怎么知道的？

text: Ruby: ...That's not important.
translation: Ruby: ……这个不关键。

text: Ruby: What matters is that if I’m representing you,[p/] your case is as good as won.
translation: Ruby: 重要的是你是否让我为你辩护，[p/]你这个案子可以说赢定了。

text: Celeste: ...You don’t even know what happened.
translation: Celeste: ……你根本就不知道发生了什么事。

text: Ruby: Then tell me.
translation: Ruby: 那告诉我。

text: Celeste hesitated,[p/] her shoulders tensing at the memory.
translation: 塞莱斯特犹豫了，[p/]她的肩膀随着回忆而绷紧。

text: Celeste: [i]*sigh*[/i] I got into an...[p/] [i]argument[/i] with my dad,[p/] and I left to clear my head.
translation: Celeste: [i]*叹气*[/i] 我……[p/]和我爸爸发生了[i]争吵[/i]，[p/]然后我想冷静一下就离开了。

text: Celeste: Tyrion found me a bit after that.[p/] I think it was a few hours after I left.
translation: Celeste: 过了一会儿提利昂找到了我。[p/]那应该是我离开的几小时后。

text: Celeste: When we came back,[p/] we saw the knights outside.[p/] That's when they arrested me.
translation: Celeste: 当我们返回时，[p/]我们看到外面的骑士们，[p/]然后他们逮捕了我。

text: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

text: Ruby: ...Celeste.[p/] If I’m going to be your attorney,[p/] I need to know [i]everything[/i] that happened.
translation: Ruby: ……塞莱斯特。[p/]如果要我做你的辩护律师，[p/]我得知道发生的[i]所有事情[/i]。

text: Celeste: What...?
translation: Celeste: 什么意思……？

text: Ruby: They found your sword inside his body,[p/] and there were traces of [b]transmutation[/b] magic around the crime scene.
translation: Ruby: 他们在尸体上找到了你的剑，[p/]然后犯罪现场有许多[b]形变术[/b]的魔法痕迹。

text: Ruby: There aren’t any other registered mages in Kornhaven.[p/] I need you to tell me the truth.
translation: Ruby: 科尔哈文并没有其他的注册法师。[p/]所以我需要你说出事实。

text: Celeste: I just told you everything that happened.[p/] What are you—?
translation: Celeste: 我刚已经把知道的都告诉你了。[p/]你意思是——？

text: She looked down, confused,[p/] before her face tightened into a scowl.
translation: 她低下了头，一脸迷惘，[p/]随后她的脸色变得阴沉起来。

text: Celeste: ...You actually think I did it, don’t you?
translation: Celeste: ……你觉得是我干的，对吧？

text: Celeste: You think [i]I[/i] was the one who killed him.
translation: Celeste: 你真的认为[i]我[/i]就是杀死他的那个人。

text: Tyrion: Wait,[p/] Ms. Tymora.[p/] Before I left the tavern to look for her,[p/] I ran into Flinhart.[p/] He was still alive.
translation: Tyrion: 等等，[p/]泰摩拉女士。[p/]我离开酒馆去找她之前，[p/]我正好碰到弗林哈特。[p/]那时候他还活着啊。

text: Ruby: ...And how much time passed between that and when you found her?
translation: Ruby: ……那你找到她之前又有多少时间？

text: Tyrion: It was probably about two hours,[p/] but—
translation: Tyrion: 大概有两个小时，[p/]但是——

text: Ruby: Which means there are two hours where she wasn’t accounted for.
translation: Ruby: 也就是说她中间有两个小时下落不明。

text: Ruby: We can work around that,[p/] but the prosecution will still—
translation: Ruby: 我们可以解释这个问题，[p/]但检察官一定会——

text: Celeste: No![p/][s/] I didn’t do this!
translation: Celeste: 不！[p/][s/]不是我干的！

text: Tyrion: She’s telling the truth, Ms. Tymora.[p/] Celeste would never do something like this.
translation: Tyrion: 她说的都是真的，泰摩拉女士。[p/]塞莱斯特不会做这种事情。

text: Ruby: Cuthbert, you can't just believe every innocent girl who bats her eyes at you.
translation: Ruby: 卡斯伯特，你可不能因为女孩子对你抛两个媚眼就相信她们的清白啊。

text: Tyrion: That is [i]not[/i] what this is.
translation: Tyrion: 我[i]完全不是[/i]这么判断的。

text: Ruby: Well, did you [i]see[/i] that she’s innocent?[p/] Can you tell me that with certainty?
translation: Ruby: 好吧，那你是[i]看到了[/i]她的清白吗？[p/]你能肯定地告诉我吗？

text: ...Celeste was being defensive at the moment,[p/] too guarded for me to read anything substantial with the Eye of Horus.
translation: ……塞莱斯特此刻非常戒备。[p/]我无法通过荷鲁斯之眼读到任何实在的信息。

text: Tyrion: ...I didn’t [i]see[/i] it,[p/] but I know that she’s innocent.
translation: Tyrion: ……我并没有真的[i]看到[/i]，[p/]但我清楚她是无辜的。

text: Ruby: Look.[p/] Either way,[p/] we need to construct a proper alibi so I can—
translation: Ruby: 行吧。[p/]要么，[p/]我们得构建一套合理的不在场证明我才能——

text: Celeste: No![p/][s/] How can I work with you if you don’t even believe me?!
translation: Celeste: 不行！[p/][s/]你都不相信我的话，我又怎么和你们合作？！

text: Ruby: ...Do you even understand the situation you're in?
translation: Ruby: ……你能理解自己所处的情境吗？

text: Celeste: I know exactly what’s happening!
translation: Celeste: 我很清楚现在发生了什么！

text: Celeste: My dad’s dead,[p/][s/] and whoever killed him is still out there!
translation: Celeste: 我爸爸死了，[p/][s/]而杀死他的人还在逍遥法外！

text: Ruby: Don’t be naive.[p/] You’re a commoner.[p/] You’re lucky [i]I’m[/i] even here.
translation: Ruby: 别太天真了。[p/]你只是个平民。[p/]光是[i]我[/i]在这里你都该觉得侥幸。

text: Ruby: There isn’t a single attorney other than me who will defend someone like you.
translation: Ruby: 再不会有第二个辩护律师愿意接下你的案子。

text: Celeste: Yeah?![p/][s/] Well, what about him?!
translation: Celeste: 是吗？！[p/][s/]那么，就他怎么样？！

text: I blinked,[p/] confused for a moment,[p/] before I realized that she was pointing at me.
translation: 我眨了眨眼，[p/]一下子有些迷茫，[p/]然后才意识到塞莱斯特直直地指着我。

text: Celeste: You're also a defense attorney, right?
translation: Celeste: 你不也是个辩护律师吗？

text: Tyrion: I-[p/][s/]I am,[p/][s/] but—
translation: Tyrion: 我、[p/][s/]我确实是，[p/][s/]但是——

text: Ruby: He’s just a kid, McCoy.[p/] He’s never even defended a case before.
translation: Ruby: 他也还只是个孩子，麦考伊。[p/]他还从来没有做过辩护。

text: Celeste: I don’t care![p/][s/] At least he doesn’t think I’m a murderer!
translation: Celeste: 我才不在乎！[p/][s/]至少他不觉得我是凶手！

text: Tyrion: C-[p/][s/]Celeste,[p/] hold on—
